title: K I N G
description:
Neil was caught between a hard place and a rock. His lungs heaved as he desperately tried to suck in air, but to no avail. He couldn't breath. Tears ran down his face as he smothered his strangled sobs against his pillow. He didn't know how long he could keep up this act. All he wanted was Todd. 

Todd couldn't sleep. He hadn't been able to for the past few nights. All he could think about was Neil. His lips as they closed over a cigarette. His brown eyes sparkling as he practiced his lines as Puck. His wet hair and how it clung to his neck after a shower. Todd squeezed his eyes tight as he tried to will away the wicked images. He shouldn't be staring at his best friend like that. It was unnatural. It meant he was a fairy. Yet Todd couldn't help but stare.

A story of two boys coming together, overcoming some of life's obstacles, and falling in love with each other; until one is tragically taken away.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Meet Me In The Woods
description:
A few months ago, Neil would have given up. If his father had taken everything he cared about from him, he would have gone to his father's study and unlocked that drawer and taken out the gun. But he was taught by John Keating for almost an entire term, and if there's one thing he learned, it's Carpe Diem - seize the day. LIVE the day. 

Neil doesn't give up, because you can't seize the day when you're dead, and sometimes rash decisions are the best decisions. He's not going to let his father take everything he cares about away, not acting, not the poets, and so Neil grabs everything that might be of use and steals his father's car. But back at Welton, he discovers that not only does everyone think he's dead, but Todd - soft, innocent, kind, oblivious Todd, who has no clue what he means to Neil - is hurt - and he won't wake up.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello, I'm Bingo Borrible! I used to be Moony, Queen of Sass. If you know how to change my @ thingy, please let me know.

I made this account ages ago and I'm not really active here any more, but I do revise it from time to time - I took down some old stories because they were bad. If you want them back, please just message me and I'll put a revised version up.

My favourite book of all time is The Borrible Trilogy, which you should definitely read and which I will not write fanfiction about. I take that book way too seriously for that. I might write fanfiction about other stuff if I really feel like it, though. My favourite character is Bingo, obviously.

People who tell us stories unimportant and we should focus on real life are wrong. Stories are the fabric of this world and without them, we would not exist. Nothing would exist, because everything is a story. We are made of stories, everything, every day, every moment of our lives that happens is a story.

title: The UnSlut Project
description:
I was the 6th-grade "slut." And I kept a diary.  So I decided to create The UnSlut Project in the hopes that my own diary entries could provide some perspective to girls who currently feel trapped and ashamed. I am publishing these entries one at a time, without changing a single word except for the names of the people involved. My limited commentary, which is confined to brackets in each entry, is meant to provide the relief of my current perspective, fifteen years later.  The UnSlut Project: Working to undo the dangerous slut shaming in our schools, communities, media, and culture by sharing knowledge and experiences.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Night, Forgotten" is now available as a paperback and e-book everywhere books are sold! If you read the first draft during #NaNoWriMo in 2017 or the second draft currently live on my Wattpad profile, then your comments inspired the changes that appear in the published book. I can't wait to share it with you!

I'm a writer, film music historian, and lyric soprano born and raised outside Boston. After graduating from Harvard University and earning a Ph.D. from the University of California, Santa Barbara, I moved to San Francisco's East Bay where I live among the redwoods with my husband, our two young children, and our dog.

Using the pen name Emily Lindin, in 2013 I founded The UnSlut Project, an online community where survivors of sexual abuse find solidarity through personal story sharing. I posted my annotated middle school diary on Wattpad and found immense support from readers, who began sharing their own experiences and building momentum in the #MeToo movement. I'm the author of "UnSlut: A Diary and a Memoir" (2015) and the director of "UnSlut: A Documentary Film" (2016); both are critically acclaimed and currently available online, in bookstores, and at local libraries. I've advocated for survivors of sexual abuse on platforms such as ABC with Katie Couric, CNN, The Doctors, Al Jazeera America, NPR, at Amber Rose's SlutWalk in Los Angeles, and at countless high schools and universities around North America.

Instagram: @meghanjoycetozer
Twitter: @emilylindin 🥸

title: The First Monsoon
description:
Book-1 

THE MONSOON LOVE SERIES 

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

AARYA SHEKHAWAT
She's a remarkable businesswoman. Known for her cold, intimidating, and dominant demeanor in the business world. She holds a unique position as the only female entrepreneur with such power and influence. However, beneath this facade, she has a hidden side that she expresses through her poetry. Through her verses, she reveals a completely different aspect of herself, one that is softer and more vulnerable.

MAHIR JAISINGH
He's a devoted admirer who falls in love with her through her poetry. Each piece of writing touches his heart deeply, making him believe that she embodies the essence of love itself. 

But as the story progresses, what will happen when the bubble of his imagination bursts and reality sets in. Will he be able to uncover her true self beneath the dominant persona she portrays?

Join us on this journey as we explore their stories and delve into the depths of their emotions, experiencing the Love of the First Monsoon alongside them.

title: LEFT UNSEEN
description:
"Left Unseen"
In a room full of a thousand voices, have you ever felt like your silence screams the loudest? Being ignored isn't just an experience; it's a wound that whispers fears of invisibility. Left Unseen is a poetic journey through the raw emotions of being overlooked, forgotten, and invisible. It unravels the suffocating weight of unspoken words and the quiet pain of existing in shadows.

Each poem resonates with those who have felt unseen-whether in crowded rooms or intimate spaces. This collection explores the fragility of connection, the ache of loneliness, and the courage it takes to reclaim your voice.

Relatable. Honest. Haunting.
For those who've felt ignored, Left Unseen offers the solace of being understood.
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
John is a twenty-two year old college boy, currently busy with his linguistics degree. He spends most of his day listening to music, an excuse to his lack of art consumption in the past few years. He loves pop, ambient, IDM, electronic music, and Charli XCX. He believes he and his laptop share common traits, like, being slow and having difficulty in completing basic tasks. Also, he tends to say lots of nonsense. (See above)

Okay, let's stop this third-person crap.

title: 𝐅𝐚𝐮𝐱 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐬
description:
Some loves don't end with marriages but with hopes of meeting each other again and promises that must be fulfilled.
***

What Aariz hates the most is Selena who has been needlessly put on a pedestal. But what he doesn't know is that she is trying her best to swim to the shore of stability while she is drowning in the outpouring of assignments and exams at her medical college.

Selena who is done with the eyes of people constantly placing her in an unapproachable position doesn't want Aariz to be the one taking her place. With him constantly spiraling down whenever someone brings up his past she knows he won't make it to the pedestal despite him getting admission into a med school. 

But when Aariz returns from Denmark for the semester break, Selena is taken aback by her mortal enemy is striking up a conversation with her.  Will they still be fighting for the position on the pedestal or allow each other to heal as time stitches back the cuts together?



🥉 in Best Cover - The Massive Awards
🥉 in Best character aesthetic - 2022 Rose Gold Award 

✨epilogue✨ has been added
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
🖤Hello everyone and welcome to Horror-Queen's Wattpad page! 🖤

Here I publish all things scary and shine light on the things that go "bump" in the night, filling your minds with possibilities of what might've made that noise you just heard. Or perhaps the shadow out of the corner of your eye.

I love visitors so please come read my biggest books like Stories to Tell in the Dark. That book will leave you shaken to your core. These stories are perfect to tell around a campfire, at a sleepover, or in your room under the cover of darkness. But what if you have a small attention span? Thats no problem! Short Scary Stories is the book for you. and not to mention the Feels Stories. Covering all of the saddest topics, this book is there to shift your gears after a long night of scary stories. Isn't that genius? Yes. It is. But that's just to name a few. We ALSO have a book for fan art people make us! Please! Submit stuff! So read them, favorite, comment, and talk to us! Our DMs are always open and we LOVE to hear how the stories have affected you. tell a friend, Comments and criticism are always appreciated. Unless you're a jerk.

Thank you for 1.7K!

Stay spooky~
horror-queen💀👻

title: Innocent Eyes
description:
In the story innocent eyes, the young character Annie Spear is somewhat of an outsider. Often feeling alone and out of place she finds herself feeling guilty, and even more so after her parents die in a tragic car accident. To which she believes is all her fault. As Annie and her brother Alex try and hold themselves together, it seems that the more they try to hold on, the faster they fall apart. Annie then begins to be in denial for her parents' death, just as a new student arrives at Cain High school. With tensions rising and suspistions growing, Annie has yet to discover the real meaning of who she is and was born to be. As promises are kept and secrets are unraveled, the power that lies within us all will be the only thing holding them together.

title: Love's Counterpart
description:
Annabelle is frightened as her first season in London approaches. Marriage? She always hoped it would be for love. But what does she know about love. When looking for clues among her letters from her past suitors, she finds a letter she's never read before. Such passion and love, although she does not know its author, she has made it her ideal of what she wishes to find ... Love's Counterpart. 

Cyril Kane is probably the least romantic person on the planet. He wouldn't know a sonnet from a bonnet but upon seeing Annabelle all that has to change. He does not know how but he is determined to be the man worthy of her love. 

Made it through 3 rounds of the contest and on the short list from which the top five finalists and grand prize winner will be picked. 2-19-18

02-01-18 Ranked 215 in Historical Fiction

#OpenNovellaContest

©All Rights Reserved by Ruechari 
If you are reading this story on any other site other than Wattpad you may be subjecting yourself to Malware. To view this story in it's original, safe form please go to the link provided. 
https://www.wattpad.com/story/128874217-love%27s-counterpart-opennovellacontest
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Sometimes you give up, and sometimes life gives you a second chance. Wattpad gave me that chance. A chance to become the writer I was destined to be. I thought my writing days over but I was happy to discover I've only just begun.

Hi! I'm Ruechari. Many call me Rue. I am a lover of love. I am a true romantic in every sense of the word. I am a world watcher and love the nuances of conversation.

People wonder how I plan out my stories and tend not to believe I am a total Pantser. I do not outline my stories. I get inspired by life and go for it. Nothing cures reader's block faster than having to think yourself out of the box you've painted yourself into with words. Creativity is needed to save the day.

SO, if you are a fan of Love, Life, Humor, and Happy Endings. I am the writer for you. Browse, enjoy, have fun, and don't forget to vote and comment. I love hearing from my readers.

Thank you for taking this unexpected journey with me! Hope to see you again here soon.

- Ruechari

title: Silence in the Walls
description:
This is for those who lost or found their voices. This is for those who could and could not breathe. This is for anyone who is stuck or escaped the dismal abyss of all-consuming emptiness. 

This is a reminder; a representation of the hardships we collectively face in our separate lives, on opposite parts of the globe.

A gentle nudge to the fact that change is constant. Whether it is positive or negative, the outcome depends on you. Only you hold that power to be able to see beyond and into your future. Make it count. I promise you, it is worth it.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey! My name's Solace. I'm just a person trying to navigate her way through the currents of life. Poetry provides an escape from reality, and allows me to pour my negative emotions into words to make sure they no longer reside within me. English is not my first language, so bear with me! Amateur alert!

title: My Golden Cage
description:
A girl in the bitter cold. Alone, with no memories. He found her, and took her in.  Will he be her salvation or her doom?

She awoke with nothing in her mind except for a single person. He lifted her from the freezing snow. Saved her life. And now she had to repay the debt, no matter what it was.  He was her only lifeline. Did it really matter whether he hurt her or not?

Charles was his friend. His guest.  And perhaps took a little too much interest in the little bird he kept.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Mga Tula Sa Isipan
description:
Kapag ang puso'y nadungisan,
Mga tula sa isipan ay masisilayan,
Ang libro na 'di pangkasaysayan,
Damdamin muli matu-tunghayan.

Tulang isinulat mula sa isipan,
Mga bagay na gustong makamtan,
Kinikilala ang bawat nilalaman,
Mula man sa saya o hantungan.

title: Words From Within
description:
Welcome to my words from within, where I lovingly dissect the writing world, pointing out all the things that make me roll my eyes.

Overused tropes? Check.
Clichéd characters? You bet.
Plot twists? Oh, joy.

Join me for a healthy dose of skepticism, criticism, and occasional ranting.
So if we are spending time on reading we might as well have a look at behind the scenes.

Reading: the act of willingly torturing yourself with fictional characters' problems, while simultaneously ignoring your own.

title: Echoing Eternity
description:
[Featured on @WattpadPoetry on 21st May 2022]

"My skin bleeds blood, but my heart bleeds words." - Vaishnavi.
      
I write when I am alone and find it hard to deal with my emotions, whenever I feel trapped in the eye of an impetuous storm, and whenever I feel overwhelmed by reality. Writing poems for me is an escape from all sorts of feelings that I feel too inundated by. Some of these poems were written in the darkest moments of my life. They became my light. I hope you feel the same way when you read them.
      
* * * * * * * * * *

Started: 6th April 2022
Finished:

* * * * * * * * * *
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Wattpad Featured✨

*****************************************************

"You don't start out writing good stuff. You start out writing crap and think of it as good and eventually, you get better at it. That's why I say that one of the most important traits is persistence." -Octavia E. Butler

*****************************************************

Hii! I'm Vaishnavi, but my friends call me Vaish.  I love writing. Like for many others, it's my escape from reality. It gives me immense joy to bleed words on paper . . . or in this case, type them on the screen.

I started out with mild poetry but now I dabble in both poetry and prose. My b'day is on 14th July, meaning I'm a Cancer. I'm (very) awkward. I'm extremely sarcastic and an ambivert. As a person, I am definitely an acquired taste.

I love staying up at night and watching the stars. I am really fond of sunsets. Cloud watching brings me a strange peace.

I'm a huge melophile and I might or might not be in love with Charlie Puth, Harvey Cantwell, Joshua Bassett, and Jonah Kagen🙈💞(strictly for musical reasons lol). I'm a Directioner and a Limelight. I love the music by New Hope Club. Benny Blanco, Khalid, Gracie Abrams, Dua Lipa, Selena Gomez, Forrest Black, Jake Scott, Tate McRae, and Johnny Orlando are a few of my favorite artists of all time.

Gosh. That's a long list😂

One may call me a lazy potato couch who loves the idea of a workout (yeah idk how it works either😂)

I am an aspiring doctor, so cheers to that!🥂

If Sarcasm and Passive-Aggressiveness had a kid and named it Sensitive, that would be me.

My Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zilch_expectations/

*****************************************************

title: Dead Poets and Dying Roses
description:
As Neil Perry's cousin from France arrives in Essex she would never have thought to ever find love again. After she has been cought with a boy in bed, he has been sent to a military school and she was suspended for six weeks and sent home. Now she's under the strict control of her uncle and aunt, who have taken her in since her parents left her and that don't tolerate this reckless behaviour anymore. But as she can't suppress her true self, she finds a way to sneak out to Welton Academy where she gets introduced to the Dead Poets Society, a group of boys, including her cousin, that want to make more of their lifes than just doctors and attorneys. Especially this one adventurous boy catches her attention and a dangerous romance begins to flourish. As they all try to follow their dreams, they risk not only their place at the school but also the chances of their future and the one of their supportive teacher Mr. Keating. And with risk there also comes loss. As a tragedy unfolds she has to decide whether she can keep her faith or will fall under the strict plans of her uncle.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
~The mind is a far better warrior than the sword.~~Literature is the most agreeable way of ignoring life.~~Sometimes we need fantasy to survive the reality.~~When the game is over, the King and Pawn go back into the same box.~
~Never forget what you are. The rest of the world will not. Wear it like armor, and it can never be used to hurt you.~

title: Suddenly yours. (#Wattys2015)
description:
I fell in love with him in ways I never knew were possible.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Writers are by nature, emotional people. I'm one of them and I don't think I'll never not be proud of the words I choose to escape my thoughts. I feel things really intensely, from the way someone says hello to me, to the way they decide to leave my life. I have the tendency to fall in love with people and emotions and words and ideas and places and dreams.

I write about so many things. I write about love and how sometimes it hurts more than all the hurt combined in the world, I write about all the words I am so afraid to say, I write about the kind of love that never leaves you at peace, I write about struggling through the night with the memories of a lost love, I write about coming clean, I write about happiness. And all I can hope for is that those words help you move on from the same things I moved on from.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart for voting and reading my work, only God knows how much that means to me.

I really hope your life is just as good as you wish and that your days are filled with joy and sunshine.

title: Behind The Mask
description:
When Brody challenges his stepfather who tries to rape him, his "step-loser" as he calls him has his revenge by throwing acid in Brody's face. 
Brody is almost certain that this is where his life will end. A broken soul and a face that was once a sight for sore eyes, now looks like molten wax. Off course Brody has a plan for all of that. He will do the things he still wanted to do, and eventually as soon as he is done with his bucket list, commit suicide, releasing the world from the most horrible face it has ever seen. For now, all he has to do is keep on the mask of humour so that nobody will suspect what he is really planning... And off course he needs to keep on the phantom mask in public as not to scare all the children in the streets. But that's okay... Isn't it? It's fun pretending it's Halloween all year long?

It is however when Brody meets E.J. next to him in the hospital that Brody needs to make a different decision. E.J. has been raped by his stepfather for many years, but he somehow keeps a positive outlook on life. Maybe inviting E.J. on the bucket-list-road-trip of a lifetime with him will keep Brody from jumping at his last stop. Will Brody be able to figure out the emotions inside him when E.J. is close before he jumps?

This is a story of friendship and love, and delving through the deepest sore to find a sparkle of hope that life could potentially go on, no matter how dark things behind the mask may seem.

This is the trilling continuation of "Behind Drawn Curtains" where we meet up with Brody, E.J., Chris, and the rest of the gang that stole our hearts in a tale full of suspense. 

PG - This book may contain strong language and sexual encounters between same sex individuals. Please be advised that although this is not a sequel, it is best to read "Behind Drawn Curtains" first. Repeating that this is not a sequel, but rather a continuation.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am living the dream... The dream was being a writer. The bonus is having readers who love reading what I write.

Gay guy out in the world, not searching for love, but hope it will someday come knocking.

Trying to change the world one story at a time. Here we laugh and cry together over the characters who now belong to all of us.

title: The Weight of Words |poetry|
description:
This collection of poems, sonnets, story's and diary's dives into the rawest depths of the human heart, exploring the full spectrum of emotion-from the tenderness of love to the consuming fire of hatred, from moments of joy to the shadows of misery.

Each piece is a window into unfiltered feelings, written in moments of passion, pain, and reflection. These are not just words; they are confessions, battles, and truths laid bare.

Perfect for those who seek poetry and words that doesn't shy away from intensity, this collection speaks to anyone who has loved, hated, or simply felt deeply. With every turn of the page, prepare to confront the beauty and darkness that reside in us all.

title: I'm still here - YiZhan
description:
I'm still here. The dreams you painted is still clear in my eyes. Your laughter still fresh in my mind and your smile still pegged in my heart. These months apart  helped me see clearer the missing puzzle and time couldn't heal the misses at all. The fairy tale we showed the whole world is not a fairy tale after all, I'm finding it hard to move on...really hard

title: The Fabulous Spec-Fic Smack Down Anthology
description:
Here I go with another writing experiment. I joined The Fabulous Spec-Fic Smack Down by LayethTheSmackDown, which required me to write Speculative Fiction flash fiction, short stories, drabbles, and poetry inspired by prompts. If you're as unfamiliar with Speculative Fiction as I was when I started this, check out @ReshapeIt for more info.

So, the writing experiment:
- I'd never written Speculative Fiction.
- Or flash fiction.
- Or drabbles.
- Or from an image prompt.

Somehow, I survived the eliminations until round four, part one. I've decided to keep following the contest on my own, so as long as it's running, I'll keep adding chapters within the deadline based on the prompts provided. But I won't stop when the contest ends. This has been such a fun project, so I've decided to pull prompts from various sources around the site and keep it going as long as I can. :)

Note: Word count varies with the application used. All the word counts here come from Google Docs.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a freelance editor/writer using Wattpad as an escape from reality. Though I torment my protagonists unfairly, I always provide them with toilets, because I can't fathom a world without plumbing. And I give them happy endings. With toilets. 😊

Schedule:
- Monday-Saturday: Reading and reviewing 'til the cows come home
- Sunday: Recuperating and preparing to do it all over again

Disclaimers:
- Christian (no LGBTQIAP+ or explicit sexual content, please)
- Adult (will unfollow for swearing and drama in my notification feed)
- Busy (no f4f, r4r, or v4v)

Technicalities:
- US English
- Google Docs
- ProWritingAid (free version)

Last words:
Subscribe to my Substack for weekly updates about my writing, life, and other nonsense, check out my Carrd for all my writing profiles, and, if you're feeling generous, drop a tip at my Ko-fi. Thanks!

description:
When Tragedy stricks, Abhira,s love Armaan takes his own life not wanting to live anymore, she is consumed by greif and regret. Overwhelmed by the weight of her guilt and love, she pleads with the GOD for a second chance to make things right but this time, the GOD sends her to another universe 

Armed with the knowledge of his vulnerabilities, she is determined to shield him from every pain that came in his way.

But will she be able change the destiny? Will she be able to save Armaan from his inner demons and the pain that threatened to tear him apart? Will their love find it's way or the shadows of his past prove too strong to overcome?

Dive into the tale of love loss and power of second chances to know more

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
' Legacy '
By Zoye Sinha

In the realm of cricket, where legends rise,
Two men shine bright, beneath endless skies.
Rohit, the calm, with a story untold.
Virat, the fire, with a heart so bold,

Together they stood, like precious in arms,
With grit and passion, and countless charms.
Virat's bat spoke, with thunderous grace,
Rohit's strokes, in a delicate embrace.

Virat, the fighter, never gave in,
A warrior with fire, that burned from within.
Rohit, the architect, with a mind so keen,
Building innings, serene and pristine.

Their legacy lives, in the hearts of all,
A bond so strong, it will never fall.
With every run, every century made,
A testament to the path they laid.

Through every win, through every loss,
They stood as one, no matter the cost.
Virat and Rohit, a tale so grand,
Together they wrote, the story of the land.

Their legacy lives, in the spirit they shared,
In every player, every fan who cared.
Virat and Rohit, forever entwined,
A bond and legacy, forever defined.

title: THE PERFECT ONE
description:
Maraming magagandang kwento ang hindi nagkakaroon ng pagkakataong maisulat sa libro o kung saan man upang paghugutan ng aral. Sa panahong lahat ay posible, may iilan pa ring tao ang hindi bukas ang kaisipan sa mga bagay na taliwas sa kanilang nakasanayan. Ang buhay ay makulay, mabango at matingkad. Hindi uunlad ang ating pagkatao kung hindi natin tatanggapin ng buong puso ang mga bago sa ating kasalukuyang kapaligiran. Sa kabilang banda ay hindi naman ito sapilitan, sapagkat maaaring hindi ito papasa sa ating panlasa o kagustuhan, dahil ang utak naman natin ay sadyang magkaka-iba. Ngunit ang pag-respeto sa iba ang siyang magiging susi upang abot kamay nating masilip ang sa kabilang banda ng kwento. Hindi naman siguro masama na subukan nating bigyan ng puwang ang mga pagbabagong ito sa ating utak, kahit hindi na lang sa puso ay sapat na iyon para magkaroon ng pagkakaintindihan sa mundo.

Ito ay tungkol sa pinaka masarap na nararamdaman ng bawat tao, ang PAG-IBIG. Pagmamahal na ating nakukuha sa mga kaibigan, pagmamahal na ibinibigay ng ating mga magulang, at pagmamahal na handa mong ilaan para sa natatanging taong itinitibok ng iyong puso. Ngunit, sa bawat relasyon ay dumaraan din naman sa pagkakataong hindi maganda o landas na malubak, at ito tiyak na susubok ngunit sadyang magpapatatag sa mga taong nagmamahalan. Sa kabila ng wagas na pag-iibigan ay nariyan ang mga sakripisyong hindi matatawaran, kaya hindi lang puso ang dapat mong ihanda, ngunit pati na rin ang iyong isipan.

Ang istoryang ito ay pinangungunahan ng dalawang lalaking karakter na sina Paolo at Grey, parehong teenagers na nakahanap ng tunay na pag-ibig sa bawat isa. Ilalahad dito kung paanong sila ay magkakagustuhan, sa kabila ng pagiging isang tuwid na lalaki ng isa sa kanila. Talaga nga bang maaaring mangyari na mabali ang iyong seksuwalidad sa ngalan ng pag-ibig? Paano ito mangyayari? Iyon ang dapat nating abangan sa puno ng aral at inspirasyong hango sa totoong buhay na kwentong "The Perfect One".

title: Spiders And Moths
description:
Deep in a forest just outside of a small town down from Tokyo surrounded by deep winding mountain crevices and dark woods rests the Forbidden Village of Akionigami
A secretive and ancient village whose inhabitants reject the outside world completely and live xenophobicly in the ominous deep mountain village mostly regarded with both fear and great fascination by the world outside.

Some things are known by the outside like how the village has and has never in history had females and in the ancient times reportedly was the home of Samurai who possessed great magical abilities but deep in Akionigami they keep their most valuable secrets hidden.
________________

Beautiful

His soft cold skin

Was beautiful

Like glass under my fingers

As a vase of roses

Strong enough 

To hold all the 

Beautiful darkness inside

But fragile when pushed over the edge

Everytime I touch him

I push him

Over the edge of daylight

Into the deep darkness of me

Until I pushed him 

Into my heart

...The worst part of me

title: Quickies
description:
Quickies when you don't have time to read but can't control the urge to read.
The chapters would take only a few seconds to read.
This book is a collection of extracts.
Or short poems.

All the edited version would be on my instagram.

Id - escapades_magical
 
⚠️ NOT A SMUT BOOK

These are responses to different themes suggested by Instagram reels.

The images used belong to the rightful owner.

NOT EDITED. - feel free to point out grammatical mistakes. 

Ps.-  If you feel something's wrong or wrongly said and hurtfull please let me know I might haven't proofread it and there might be some misunderstanding. So please let me know so that I don thurt anyone else's  feelings.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I don't like stories with sad endings I believe " Reading is a way of escaping reality and reality is sad in itself so a little magic and a happy ending wouldn't harm anyone. " So, I would be writing stories in the hope that you would be able to escape from reality for at least a few minutes.

If I don't manage to make you cry or laugh, if I don't manage to bring out your emotions. Please stop and find something else. Because you deserve a author who did touch ur heart.

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・。.・゜✭

Here I sit carving poetry from pain like my tears are words and my fingers are blades 💫

╰─➤ ✎  I am 19-years-old Indian writer. I started writing poetry when i was in 6th grade. I was intrigued by cosmic nights, polaroids, cafe shops , libraries, artists with weird obsessions and dark thoughts, smokers with hazel eyes. Poetic souls with fragile bodies. I just love the lost and the lonely.

╰─➤ ✎ Wattpad has become more than just a social platform for me. Here I ink down my feelings without thinking of  being judged. Hence even a little bit of support from you guys means so much to me

╰─➤ ✎ I love deep conversations late at night. So if anybody is up for it! Then i would love to have a conversations with you. My dms are always open for you.



───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────
A poetry for all my special readers
───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

"You are not your name nor your age.
You are not a weight or
the size of clothes you wear.
You are not the color of your hair or
the dimples in your cheeks.
You are all the books you read
and all the words you speak.
You are your croaky morning voice
and the smiles you try to hide.
You are the sweetness in your laughter
and every tear you have cried.
You are the songs you sing so loudly,
when you know you are all alone.
You are the places that you have been to
and the one you call home.
You are the things you believe in
and the people that you love.
You are the pictures in your bedroom
and the future you dream of.
You are made of so much beauty,
but it seems that you forgot when you
decided that you were defined by
all the things you are not."

title: Thanatos
description:
Jungkook had everything in his life but not the love he desired for  actually after the death of his parents his boyfriend cheated on him with other men he was suffering from philophobia -fear to love ...due to his mistakes his company went on bankruptcy he lost everything..he want to die so he went to his old company which has been closed for many years but ends up saving a cute boy and falls for him at first sight...and now he is suffering from thanathophobia -fear of loosing someone....

please they will bully me beat me they haunt me in my dreams please let me die~~ taehyung


ohh baby come and let me love you~~jungkook

title: This Contused Kernel of mine (Part-1)
description:
Whenever my heart felt tapestried with emotions too heavy to handle, I did nothing but write. I wrote it all on a paper. Today as I share it with everyone, I share my heart, my emotions, a treasured part of me with everyone who comes across this piece. 

This compilation of poetry is about never feeling enough, loved or appreciated. To anyone who feels this way, all I have to say is "I love you, and I'm proud of you. You are enough"

I poured everything into this, all the tears I cried, all the days that felt like an eternity. I hope you like it :)
                                                                                    -Sri

authorBio:
Welcome to this psychedelic oasis of words. I began word crafting in 2015, what an adrenaline rush it is coming to grips with language & learning to weave tales that span tapestries of emotion & sensation. 
 #Female #18+ #Neurodiversity #FanGal #Addict #Dreamer #InSane #Humanist #Activist #Romantic #Flawed #ThinksDifferently #Adventurous #Optimist #DiverseStories #NoHate #BodyPositive #Feminist #Sinner #Storyteller #Bibliophile #Representation #BLM #ReadWithoutPrejudice
 #GifPorn stories on this profile are unedited drafts, mostly #Multimedia retellings or fanfics that invite you to escape into moral paradoxes & guilty pleasures if you dare plunge headlong within these pages to a fictional world...  
Whether you're ghost sailing  or leaving a cookie trail of feedback, welcome, make yourself at home.  
In recent years, many storytellers have moved their work to #PaidWattpad #Amazon #Radish #Inkitt etc to earn a living from their craft. If there's a story you like & it's free, the only reward for unpaid hard work is your precious follow, vote or comment.
Every one of you is treasured especially when you wait for updates from the slowest storyteller on Wattpad.
Although crazy busy these days, the aim remains to reply to fans or people reading stories on this profile and leaving messages or comments.  If you're following me, thank you soooo much, here's extra special ♥♡♥♡ just for you.

authorBio:
Come and be worshipped, come and be caressed, / My dark Vanessa, crimson-barred, my blest / My Admirable butterfly! Explain / How could you, in the gloam of Lilac Lane, / Have let uncouth, hysterical John Shade / Blubber your face, and ear, and shoulder blade?
Nabokov, Pale Fire

title: The Writer's Love Affair
description:
❝Writing was the love of my life until I met you.❞

• • •

Christopher Wells is a screenwriter and accomplished novelist. Being a New York Times best-selling author of steamy and controversial books, he is praised by women all over the world. Leslie Quinn thought she knew everything about being pushed to her limits until she begins working for him as his editor. Full of demands, he breaks the fantasy she has of him being a man of carnal chivalry. It's all pitchfork and fire until Leslie unknowingly becomes the main character in his latest book, all the while trying to bring his taboo acts written on page to life. But that becomes a challenge in and of itself with how surprisingly pure he is.

title: just the two of us ☼ ginny weasley
description:
[on a slight break for now]

adele evans was often told that love was like a flower. 

wilting. 

falling. 

rooting. 

rising. 

blooming. 

the sun would look upon that flower, that love, and either cherish it or destroy it in a flame of blaze. scorched to ashes. 

adele desired to watch the flower of love wilt, fall, root, rise, and bloom before her very eyes. she was determined to prove to the sun how much she cherished ginny weasley, and not even the brightest thing on the planet would outshine the love she felt for her.


ginny weasley x OC

title: Falling In Love Is Easy... (Issa Thompson Love Story) [Complete - EDITING]
description:
"When I first met you, i had no idea you would mean this much to me" Guess this is why I was surprised that i fell in love with you... find out the tale of two people who assumed they were strangers, and couldn't be in the same room for 5 seconds without wanting to kill each other. They are brought together by their two best friends (who are dating each other), who hope to get these two "strangers" out of their "f*ck love" stage. Will they live happily ever after with or without each other??? Find out this and more by reading :-)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
What up tho!?!? My government is Tiana, but I go by Tee... i was dropped into the world July 5, and yeah that's enough info about me... anything else you wanna kno, hit up my inbox, it's always open :)

If you ever want a cover done by me, just inbox me the details (story title, what/who's it about, etc.)... do NOT ask for one if you aren't going to use it, I don't like for my time to be wasted

♥♥♥♥♥♥ HEY! You!... yes, you! ...why are you sad/frowning... you're absolutely beautiful ^_^ pwetty pwease smile :-) ...thank you sooooooo much, now i'm happy again :-D  ♥ remember there are no "ugly" people in the world, just judgmental people, we get so caught in attempting to look like our favorite celebs or those who we think others are attracted to, that we fail to realize our own beauty,  and therefore a lot of us begin to battle our self-esteem.... people can call you "ugly" all they want, but you have to believe you're BEAUTIFUL before you expect anyone else to feel that way about you. CONFIDENCE is key ♥♥♥♥♥♥

i live in a world, where being yourself is "weird" or "lame" ...where the word "follower" is more than a friend on social media ...where you get judged for standing out or trying to fit in ...where society fucks us all & then cry when we experience a tragedy ...where your friends will eventually become your worst enemy, & your enemy will become your best friend ...where losing a phone is more drastic than losing your virginity ...where girls receive t.v. shows for being pregnant at 16, but no one receives even half the fame for doing the right thing ...& where all the shows with a positive meaning were cancelled for shows with NO meaning
sooooooooooooooo FUCK IT! be you & don't let nobody tell you not to, because at the end of the day, you're bound to be judged regardless whether you're being you or going with the flow


i'll be your best friend *starts singing* you got a friend in me... lol, don't be shy (....because i am "/ ...)

authorBio:
While some might say it's a bit harsh, most agree that in the 21st century, students don't face any real consequences for their behavior anymore.

The concept of detention or in-school suspension -- putting a bunch of delinquents in the same room and expecting this to improve their behavior? Come on.

But now, a certain US state has come up with an idea for a new disciplinary system that would make anyone not want to get in trouble...

title: Arama of Love: Her Divine Secret [On HOLD]
description:
ARAMA OF LOVE: HER DIVINE SECRET

Our hands left each other.
I remain standing inside the border while people dragged him towards another border.
Our eyes do not leave each other. I saw tears in his eyes for me.
I can see his eyes are shedding tears for me.
That is when I realised, he was not just my saviour, he was not just my companion for some days, nor he was just my friend.
In these chaos I didn't realise the feelings I had for him and the feelings he had for me.
I became blind in my stubbornness and ego.
Seeing him getting far from me, something is breaking inside me.

He was in love with me and so am I.
I am in love with him.
My heart starts loving him but I realised it too late.
Nothing can happen now.

It's our end.
It's the end of whatever we had between us.
It's the end......

"Woh phisalta raha meri hateli se ret ki tarah,
Jab mutthi band ki tab tak wo jaa chuka tha."

Excessiveness of everything is harmful whether it's stubbornness or humbleness.
At some points stubbornness and arrogance is necessary while at some points humbleness is needed.

A story where one being stubborn, is determined to find her love no matter what. On the other hand, one who has always sacrificed his own desires for the sake of others, has made up his mind that this time,  he won't let go. He's willing to do whatever it takes to be with her again. 

A story full of sacrifices, madness, craziness, suspense and love.


"Janabe Aalee ko mera chehra pasand na aaye ye baat mujhe qubool hai,
Magar mera intezaar pasand na aaye ye mujhe qubool nahi" 
---Aineey☆






ATTENTION❗️
Story is written by me personally so do not dare to copy my work.
I will not hesitate in reporting your account.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hi! I exist👋  You didn't sneeze but I still blessed you with my stories, hehe.😋                           Just a star in search of her sky☆  Do follow me on Instagram👉 https://instagram.com/vibewithstargirl?igshid=ZGUzMzM3NWJiOQ==

title: I Wish To Be The Moon
description:
I want to go to the moon
and just cry.
Seeing the earth still moving,
everyone's life still moving 
without me- 
they still move
• • •

I feel the tears building as I sit here
disconnected from everyone and thing,
I sit here with tears building.
Bitting my lip, pinching my ear, 
feeling separated from everyone
• • •

The mirror lies about the truth-
making imperfections invisible,
hiding them from my eyes.
The wicked mirror lie about the memories-
hiding the scars
• • •
Tous Droits Réservés

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
During the Great Recession, Amy's mentor was Emily Dickinson, of whom she's read all 1800 poems. Although separated by many years and coming from very different backgrouds, she wanted to study her and learn what set her apart from other poets. She was soon inspired to write her own poetry and began in earnest, only to discover that it was possible. Each poem became an experiment. Her work reveals a humble background, small moments and personal discoveries.

BTW, she also happens to maintain the largest online paranormal dictionary, The Mystica, and the Google Drive link here goes to it. There is surely a kernel of truth somewhere in there.

title: Echoes of a Silent Heart
description:
And you? What would you do for love?

~ write poems about you🥀

♡♡♡
"What do you do when the ache becomes unbearable? When your heart screams, but your voice remains silent?

Echoes of a Silent Heart is a collection of poems dedicated to someone who may never know - someone I should perhaps forget, someone I shouldn't still be writing about... yet here I am.

These poems are the unspoken confessions, the quiet cries of love that was never meant to be. They capture the bittersweet journey of holding onto feelings that should have faded but linger like a shadow. For every soul who has loved in silence, this book speaks the words you never dared to say."
♡♡♡

Black folks aren't a monolith. Black is a culture with subcultures. Black is rich, Black is poor... Black is peace, Black is war... Black evolves, Black creates... Black wasn't forced on us, we created Black by combining scraps of traditions lost to us with a twist on the Eurocentric wasteland we were stolen to. If Black ain't powerful? If Black ain't Black?!

i got something for all of us.

An anthology of thought.

authorBio:
Hola people!
I heard good looks kill, so I didn't put my picture as the display picture cause I don't wanna see you die.
Well, I'm a crazy person but for me, crazy is a loose term. I sometimes stare at a eraser and laugh when someone asks me just what I find so interesting about the eraser. I sometimes have long sobbing fests until my favorite song comes on and dance for no apparent reason. I also say things like "Do you ever wonder where the eraser bits go?" or I just have a thumb war with myself. I find that I am a very tough opponent!

Follow my backup account @darkpoetesssbackup

Scribbled Stories turned true.
Sophisticated. Opinionated. Beautifully chaotic. Writer. I love playing with words and not hearts.

• You can call me whatever you want but I'll be taking your cake.
• I have two rules: First, I'm never wrong. Second, if I'm wrong, back to the first rule.
• We are dust and to dust we shall return.
• If you use your head even sweets won't make you fat.

Do DM feedback but I may reply late nvm I'm way too lazy.
My laziness is like 8 whenever it lies down becomes infinity!

My life's Motto- Never take life too seriously; No one ever gets out alive anyways! But I'm still alive because the devil is afraid that I'll take over the throne in hell when I get there.

If you've ever felt like hurting yourself, that you dont matter, ever tried self harm or cried yourself to sleep you aren't the only one. There are so many of us like you. Just remember you are an amazing person and I along with so many other people care about you even if thats hard to see.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Dear bullies,
You know that boy you pushed over yesterday?
Committed suicide last night.
That girl you called fat?
She's starving herself.
And that boy you teased for crying?
His mother died.
You know that man you made fun of for his scars?
He fought for our country.
That girl you called dumb?
She had dyslexia.
That child you called retarded for being in a
wheelchair?
He risked his life to save a 4-year-old
That girl you pushed down the other day?
She's already being abused at home.
And everyone else you've been mean to?
You've either hurt them really bad or ruined their life.
Put this in your profile if you're against bullying.
I bet 99% of you won't, but if you are that 1% with
time and a HEART, Then show it.
Bullying causes more than tears, it causes death.

title: Nothing More than Me
description:
There's no order in the chapters of this book.
There's no fictional story in it.
There are no mysterious worlds or intriguing characters.
In this book there are only parts of me. It's like an interior journal.
If you want to know the depths of a stranger, read it. If you want to see that you're not alone, give it a look. Maybe in me you'll find what I hope to find in the others: a similarity.
And If you don't care, that's ok: I know. You don't even know me, right?

(The cover's image was generated through Hotpot's AI)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello everyone! My name is Kiki and I love writing: it's my passion since I was little, along with reading and drawing. :)
I try to come up with fantasy and mystery stories set in dreamy places, with as main characters special, but also very relatable people.
I pretty much follow my creative streak, so sometimes I have some deals with consistency. If you have any suggestion for my stories, I'd be glad to hear them - I give importance to every comment I find in the section. :)

After all, I still believe in the good ending and in the power of hope. Life is so beautiful, don't you think?
Feel free to dm me as long as you're respectful and friendly ;)

title: The Wars In Hephaestus (Book: 1- A Love Acquitted)
description:
"Zeus!!!!!!!!", Hephaestus cries as he storms into throne room.
"What is it my son?", The Great King of The Gods and Father of men Zeus asks.
"I want to divorce my wife Aphrodite", says Hephaestus as he tries to bring his anger under control.

Zeus looks upon his son Forger of The Gods and creator of his beloved Master Bolt and all other weaponry on Mount Olympus, cocks an eyebrow while he searches his sons face, he thinks as his shocking light blue eyes stare into the depths of his son's dark hazel brown ones, "This day should have come long ago. Hephaestus may not be the most beautiful or in godly terms beautiful at all but he is the purest of heart among us except for that accursed God of Honesty who couldn't lie to Hera for me. She was sore vexed when she learn of yet another affair (frown). Hephaestus thou is my complete opposite always loyal to his wife, so what could one have done to create such a stir in my beloved childs mind". 

"What did she do this time", Zeus finally says.
(CC) Attribution - Partage dans les mêmes conditions

title: A Heart I Couldn't Heal
description:
I gave him my everything, but he could never see my love for him. He was too lost in the remnants of a love that I could never replace...💔
.
Have you ever loved someone?
Have you ever destroyed yourself for someone?
Have you cried for someone else's pain like it was yours?
Have you ever felt helpless that you couldn't heal the heart of your favourite person? 
Have you ever wished for you to be that person who they still loved? 
.
If any of this resonates with you, welcome to A Heart I Couldn't Heal-a book that offers solace and acceptance for the pain and helplessness we endure every day 😌
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Deva Darshini L is a budding writer, poet, storyteller and content creator who seek opportunities to articulate her emotions, using this platform as a means to express her creativity. Join her in experiencing lighthearted content on this page! Have a happy reading time Makkaleyyy!! 💓

I was recently called a "literary monster", but do not worry, because this will be the final collection of the year. if I am alive, art will never be dead.

title: The Spirits' Feast
description:
This short poem foreshadows the Spirits' Feast, an annual holiday that takes place in the magical country of Aurelia (the world crafted in my spooky YA fantasy, the Aurelian Legacy). For one day, the magic that binds ghosts to their places of death is lifted, allowing spirits to leave the premises on which they died and roam the land. Some ghosts will inevitably use this day for ill. The aims of others are far less sinister than us mortals might believe.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm in the process of publishing my first full-length novel, the Aurelian Legacy. I've been working on developing the idea for over four years, so this story is very near and dear to me. It is meant to be the first of an eight-book series. At a minimum, I will upload a new chapter every week.

When I'm not writing, I'm usually found binge-watching Buffy reruns or crossing off spots from my travel bucket list (most recently, Nicaragua and Antarctica). As you may have already guessed from my story, I adore the spooky season.

Note: I will not do V4V's. But I will do R4R's when stories are of mutual interest. I will gladly offer constructive feedback on the books of others during R4Rs if they request it and offer the same courtesy on mine.

title: COUNTRY BEFORE FAMILY
description:
'Waqt aaney par mrityu ko bhi jeet lunga' - Caption Manoj Kumar Pandey
 (Param Vir Chakra Awardee)

This poem written by me and is about a character from the Rajwanshi series by SwatiSandeep❤️

To the bravehearts that live for the nation and can die to protect it, to our soldiers that have devoted their entire being for our country, words cannot express my gratitude for everything you have done for us and so I pray everyday, for your safety and for you to return to the people you call home.




'Waqt aaney par mrityu ko bhi jeet lunga' (When the time comes, I will conquer death).

title: Different Prisons
description:
Join the author as he takes you on an extraordinary journey into his intense world, teaching convicted felons inside two all-male state prisons in northern Ohio. The story Different Prisons is a collection of short stories, poetry, and anecdotes taken directly from Dr. Thomas Davison's personal journals and unique experiences. This is real-life stuff, not the 'Hollywood version.' It will make you laugh, and it will make you cry ...

What do the readers have to say about Different Prisons?

A Journey You Never Expected to Take, But Will Cherish
I have loved this story so much. It will make you laugh, cheer, and cry. I think that a book or story that teaches you so much, including about yourself, is rare-highly recommended. It's a must-read.
I Truly Love This Story
I love this story! It is so real. He gives the reader insight into the day-to-day life of a prisoner. I give this story my highest rating and recommend you try it. You will be hooked!
Fresh and New
This is the most honest look at life inside a prison I have seen. The accounts are real and so raw. They allow you to feel everything the author and his students feel. This is a story filled with insights into somewhere most of us will never go. It is well worth your time and a gripping read.
A Story That Enlightens You
I've become enlightened by the stories of those who are/were incarcerated for whatever reason. Doctor D's experiences show that what society may say is irredeemable truly is if one only provides guidance to the light.
A Powerful and Deeply Moving Story
Bravo! Doctor D., You offer so much fascinating insight into prison life. What a great story and Journey this is. I love your addition of prison-themed poems. They are so raw and moving. I know exactly what you mean when discussing different kinds of prisons. I have imprisoned myself with negativity. Your ability to struggle through to reach these men is inspiring to read. Thank you for sharing this fantastic story!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
AUTHOR BIO

Dr. Thomas Davison has taught college coursework inside two State Prisons in Ohio for the past eight years. His observations and interactions with his incarcerated students have deeply moved him. This motivated him to create poems and short stories about their daily lives and experiences. Thomas has recently started a not-for-profit Entrepreneur Services for Felons (ESF). He has dedicated 100% of his writing earnings to providing free one-on-one support services for felons and ex-felons. Dr. Davison has created two Writing Clubs within the prisons. These incarcerated students are his beta readers to ensure he speaks in their voice and keeps it honest.

His published novels include:

The Boy With Strange Eyes: award-winning YA Fantasy.

Different Prisons: NF-Memoirs, Dr. Davison's personal story about teaching inside the prisons. 

How to Write a Winning Dissertation:  Academic how to book.

title: WHO CURSED YOU IN SILENCE?
description:
As I stood at the line of silence, death in my darkest days, a bird sang within me, "Who cursed you in silence?" It was the darkest days I asked myself. How am I going to change blue to purple? This question became the catalyst for my odyssey from silence to healing. 
In this anthology, I share my metamorphosis, like a pansy butterfly through the sky. I rose above the battles to discover the true meaning of life in the depths of darkness. May these poems envelop you like a warm letter of congratulations and inspire you to break free from the chains of silence.
 Unlock your padlock of strength, let the broken soul tell its story, and may healing be the gift that awaits you, like the sun in the morning.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Mukelabai Kolomu, a passionate poet from Lusaka, Zambia. Uses words to express inner thoughts and emotions. I craft evocative poems that capture complex human emotions and I'm inspired by Maya Angelou, Lana Del Rey, Tupac Shakur and other fellow poets.

title: The Untitled Project
description:
Short stories or poems written from the psychological deep dives into our own human emotions.

All shorts are fictional in nature and any names mentioned are also fictional.

Not based on true stories, but based on true human emotion.

These stories are not meant to invoke further feelings of distress, but rather allow the reader to feel that self-deprecating thoughts and emotions are real, they are human, and you have every right to feel them as any other.

Please do not continue reading if you feel they trigger you.

Breathe.

Feel.

Release.

You got this.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello Darlings,

I am from a small town in Texas, where I have been writing stories for as long as I knew what they were. My first book, 'Bitten', has been a work in progress for 7 years (since I was 13), and although the concept is a bit dated, I am reconstructing it to give it a very fresh perspective. Please follow, and don't forget to show love and support for a growing author!

Much love,
Kate ❤️

title: Whispers of the Soul
description:
Ranked 4 in Poem Collection! Thank you guys!

This is a collection of poems, prose, sonnets, verses, and short stories I've written since I was around 13. Some pieces are from years ago, while others are recent.

I've named this collection Whispers of the Soul because each piece captures my curiosities, the feelings I longed to experience, realizations, and deep reflections on the world around me as I grew up.

Now, at 19, I feel a bit more confident in sharing these pieces-both what I've already written and what's yet to come. I hope this book resonates with you and brings something meaningful to your soul.

Thank you deeply for each vote, read, and all your support.

title: Things I've never said
description:
TINS

To the things I've never said. 
To the things you've never said. 
To the the words 
that have never been spoken 
To all those emotions 
that couldn't have a chance 
to be expressed. 
To all 
and every single piece of mind 
that could never been understood 
To all of those 
who never believe 
that word have value. 
To all the important things 
that has to be secrecies.  

Words speaks for itself and has lived for decades. 
That's why poetry exists, not only for lovers but for the thoughts and feelings  that couldn't been spoken. 

This is a collection of poems about love, secrets, envy, loss, heartbreak, deception and strange feelings that haven't been spoken. It's about All of those things that stop us to be outspoken. To be true, raw and honest. To all the things we have never said.

authorBio:
I am a reader and a listener of stories. I am an animator and designer by profession, but my love for sciences and art runs deep.

My love for stories started very young when my grandfather used to tell me mythological stories. He used to take me to the beach early in the morning and tell me various stories of different divinities in the Hindu pantheon. And these stories stayed with me.

I have started writing novels quite recently and I enjoy it thoroughly. I love travelling, Dancing, listening to music, anime and movies.            


I am primarily a sci-fi writer but now diversifying into other genres just to improve my writing.  So I would truly appreciate feedback in comments and also a follow.  If you like my work please give my stories a vote for encouragement.          


Follow me on Instagram for snippets and memes related to them or even some nonsensical stuff.

title: FRIEND REQUEST ACCEPTED
description:
"Sa ilalim ng mga bituin, sa pagitan ng mga chat at mensahe, nagsimula ang isang kwento ng mga pusong magkaibang mundo."

Sa isang tahimik na gabi, nag-klik ang isang friend request na magbabago sa buhay ni Arjay. Isang simpleng add friend kay John Van, isang lalaking hindi inaasahan na magiging bahagi ng kanyang buhay. Si John Van, isang straight na lalaki mula sa Taytay, at si Arjay, isang bisexual na massage therapist mula sa El Nido, ay nagtagpo sa isang pagkakataon na puno ng mga tanong at misteryo.

Sa kabila ng magkaibang mundo nila-isang mundong puno ng forbidden love at mga fake dating-pumunta sila sa isang landas na puno ng kilig, tuksuhan, at mga hindi inaasahang damdamin. Ang kanilang kwento ay hindi lang isang karaniwang pag-ibig; ito ay isang pagsubok ng tadhana, pagkatao, at ang tapang ng puso na magpatawad at magpursige.

Habang unti-unting nagiging malapit sa isa't isa, natutuklasan nila ang mga lihim ng isa't isa-mga takot, mga pangarap, at ang hirap ng pagkatalo sa isang relasyon na hindi pa handa ang mundo. Sa bawat chat, sa bawat mensahe, at sa bawat titig ng mata, nagsisimula ang isang kwento na magpapalakas sa kanilang loob at magbibigay-liwanag sa kanilang madilim na mga sandali.

Ito ang kwento ng pagmamahal na ipinagbabawal, ng mga puso na natututo ng bagong pag-ibig sa hindi inaasahang paraan. A love story that started from a simple chat, but bloomed into something deeper than they ever expected.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Maligayang pagdating sa aking mundo ng mga salita! Ako ang tagapagsalaysay ng mga kwentong humuhugot sa tunay na buhay-mga tagumpay, kabiguan, luha, at ngiti. Naniniwala ako na bawat paglalakbay, gaano man kahirap, ay may dalang aral at liwanag. 

Sumama sa akin sa pagsilip sa mga istoryang hinabi mula sa reyalidad-mga simpleng pangarap, malalalim na sugat, at walang sawang pagbangon. Sana'y makita mo ang iyong sarili sa bawat pahina at maramdaman ang init ng pag-asa. 

**Genre:** 
✨ Drama 
✨ Slice of Life 
✨ Inspirational 

**Follow me:** 
📩 Huwag mag-atubiling mag-iwan ng komento o mensahe. Tara, mag-usap tayo ng buhay!

title: A Deathly Goodbye
description:
"Do you ever think about living, as much as you think about dying?" He asks, standing in the doorway of my bedroom.

"I dont think I was ever meant to live. I think I was put on this earth to see how much a human being can suffer. I am just an experiment. 
a miserable, sad little experiment gone wrong."

This book is a collection of poems, thoughts, and inner conversations presented as a therapist like conversation where my brain has the problem and my inner voice or he as I refer to in the book tries to rationalise the feeling or thought and tries to give a different way to look at things or tries to make sense of it.





I hope you enjoy reading 🖤
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Little Collection of Self Written Shayari
description:
Shayari is a form of art produced via the use of rhythmic words systematically arranged to express rich emotions with a knack of style.
Shayaris are basically written in Urdu and I'm not a native speaker but have an avid love for the form of art. 
These are basically a few lines that came in my mind and I find them fascinating so I decided to share them with others as well. After all, beautiful or not, good or bad any form of art deserves exposure. Art is for everyone.
This is in Urdu but written in English as I am not capable of fo writing or reading the language and I believe it is a popular language so there are other people like me too.
If anybody reads it I really hope they find amusement even if it is the size of a pea.
Happy reading.

title: 𝐐𝐮𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐢 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐚 𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐚 𝐚 𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐚 - Måneskin
description:
𝕒 𝕗𝕒𝕟𝕗𝕚𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟 𝕒𝕓𝕠𝕦𝕥 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕓𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕥𝕙𝕒𝕥 𝕤𝕥𝕠𝕝𝕖 𝕒𝕝𝕝 𝕠𝕦𝕣 𝕙𝕖𝕒𝕣𝕥𝕤 from the pov of Marlena (most of the time, but the other pov's are about her). Marlena is the muse behind the band, mentioned in their album "Il ballo della vita".

Who is this mystery girl they used to sing and play about? And how does she cope with the fact they seemed to have forgotten about her now their success is booming and taking over the world. Even better, with songs Damiano wrote about her. Every fan knows her name, singing those songs that felt so intimate to her, with brilliant lyrics that touched her heart the first time she heard them. 
But now she only has this odd agonizing feeling hearing Damiano singing her name on the radio when she can't remember the last time she heard him in real life.

***
Marlena is a fictional person created by Måneskin themself, so credits to them. 
And also credits for the lyric references I'll use, they belong to the band's genius minds :) Remember that this is fiction, I don't mean to image the band as someone they're not, I just wanted to write a touching background story about Marlena

***
I can also recommend this story to people who don't have a connection with Måneskin, but want to read poignant prose with metaphors, sometimes with a poem in between. 
But I think you'll want to listen to their music anyway after reading this. I see this as a letter filled with love for the band, hoping for them that they're doing alright
Tous Droits Réservés

title: the muse
description:
Book Description:

In this carefully crafted collection of poems, each verse is a doorway into the vast spectrum of human experience. From the delicate whispers of first love to the aching shadows of loss, every poem invites readers to pause and reflect, to feel deeply and live fully. The pages are a tapestry of emotions-woven with joy, stitched with sorrow, and threaded with hope.

The collection transcends genre and form, offering free verse poems that speak to the soul in unique ways. Nature's quiet majesty breathes life into one page, while the raw pulse of urban chaos electrifies the next. Each piece captures fleeting moments: a sunrise breaking the night's hold, the comfort of an old friend's laugh, the bittersweet memory of a love that's gone.

This is more than a book-it's a sanctuary for the heart and mind, a place where readers can rediscover themselves through the universal language of poetry. Whether you seek solace, inspiration, or simply the beauty of words, this collection promises to linger long after the last line is read.

title: Melancholic and Other Poems (PUBLISHED)
description:
♡ My book, Melancholic and Other Poems, is now published and available for purchase!
You can get your copy at nicholaskyleedwards.com or by following Linktree in my bio.
Paperbacks available on Amazon and many other book sellers, just search my name or the title.
EBooks available on Kindle, Apple, Nook, Kobo, and many other booksellers, just search my name or the title. ♡

Melancholic and Other Poems is a debut collection that explores the complexities of mental health, particularly as experienced by adolescents. Through freestyle form, this collection consists of twelve pieces that delve into themes of despair, vulnerability, and the human condition.

The writings capture the essence of melancholy, offering intimate glimpses into the emotional turmoil that accompanies mental struggles. With intense reflections of depression to addiction, this collection is not just a reflection on pain; it is a journey towards understanding and acceptance. Whether through crude imagery or evocative prose, the works compel us to confront the balance of light and darkness within us all.

title: Saltwater
description:
A collection of poetry by CordeliaGrey Oriana Allen

On loss, grief, and love. 
A dedication to my daughter, Elsie. 

I hope to turn this into a physical collection, this, is a first step.

This collection, is as deep and salty as the ocean in which it was born. This journey of healing, of grieving, of learning to mother a child who is not on this earth, has been so entirely complex. Sometimes it is rage, hot and sharp. Sometimes it is depression. Sometimes it is hope and joy in inexplicable ethereal moments. But always, it comes from a deep love, a deep heart, and always, it is flavored with salt. Releasing these poems, is vital for me. 

A new poem will release every Tuesday and Thursday until the book is complete. Thank you for holding space with me. 

If you'd like to support me further please leave a star, follow, check out my YouTube channel "Cordelia Grey Space" or leave me a tip on PayPal, Venmo, or cashapp at wildwoodbirth
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My first name is CordeliaGrey

Names are important to me. Cordelia means daughter of the sea, heart of a lion. Grey for all the grey spaces in between, for the things others don't want to talk about, for the moments small and forgotten. For the color of asphalt and starlight.

My middle name is Oriana, for its celestial quality, for new beginnings, and golden hours.

My Full name, CordeliaGrey Oriana Allen.

I am a mother to two children, my son Despin Tristen Keith Allen, and my Daughter who no longer resides on this earth, Elsie LynnGayle Allen.

I am an artist, both digital and traditional. I work with fantasy art, mushrooms, fae, and motherhood magic.

I am a writer, of poetry and substance. I have written a lot about birth and my time as a birthworker and birth photographer. Right now I am focused on releasing my poetry I have written over the years. I am also writing a fantasy novel, and dedicating a lot of time to creating art and paintings.

When I am not making art you can find me making bread, cooking, dabbling in hobbies, dancing in the rain, watching awesome movies, and creating or holding safe spaces with friends.

I am a scorpio sagittarius cusp. I love the ocean, rainstorms, buttons, and tea. I am a huge nerd, and my favorite fandom is Avatar the Last Airbender. My car is designed to look like Appa!

I am an easy going, passionate soul, with a lot of tears, a lot of love, and a lot of anxiety. I am also Autistic, and ADHD. I look forward to connecting, sharing space here, and most importantly, sharing my writing.

You can find me on YouTube, TikTok(for now), Facebook, and Instagram at CordeliaGreySpace, CordeliaGrey.space or Corners.of.salt

Thanks for being here.

title: My Poetry Stash
description:
Welcome to My Poetry Collection

This is no ordinary book. It is a labyrinth of musings, a kaleidoscope of thoughts, and a journey into the untamed wilderness of my mind. Each page holds fragments of life's mysteries, fleeting moments of clarity, and questions without answers-all woven into an uncharted tapestry of words, emotions, and imaginings.

Will you dare to wander here? Step lightly, for this is a realm where whimsy dances with introspection, where shadows stretch long, and chaos whispers secrets to those brave enough to listen. What you discover may be fragments of me-or reflections of yourself.

Follow the breadcrumbs scattered through this forest of whispers, where moonlight pierces shadows, leaves crunch underfoot, and every path twists with unexpected turns. Perhaps you'll stumble upon the shadow of a forgotten dream, the echo of a question you've long avoided, or the flicker of truth hidden in the randomness of it all. But beware: not all paths lead where you expect, and some truths may demand more courage than you imagined.

These pages are not merely words; they are invitations, challenges, and companions for your journey. They are windows into uncharted thoughts and mirrors reflecting the depths of your own soul. The terrain of my mind is unpredictable, the pathways steep, the vistas dizzying-and the journey, unrelenting.

So, consider this your invitation to explore. I offer no promises, no certainty, and no solace for the stirrings of your heart or the truths you may uncover. Enter if you will, but tread boldly, keep your wits sharp, and your imagination sharper still. Fortune favors the daring-or so they say.

Good luck, traveler.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey there! I'm Iza-welcome to my corner of the universe! I'm a writer with a boundless imagination, spinning stories, crafting poems, composing songs, and creating anything that sparks my soul. Writing is my sanctuary amid life's chaos-sometimes pure joy, sometimes a deep dive into the strange, profound, and human.
Here's what makes my heart sing: warm hugs, perfectly stacked sandwiches, the escape of TTRPGs, and moments of delight that brighten gloomy days. What could I live without? Bugs (the creepy kind), the ache of loneliness in a crowd, and maddening little sounds that unravel the calmest minds.
When not immersed in creating, my thoughts wander the cosmic unknown. I ponder: does God keep a low profile to avoid glitches in the cosmic code? What are we to the divine-children, followers, or characters in a grand narrative? Could every belief hold a shard of truth-or are we looking through the wrong lens? Maybe all gods imagined exist. Or just one. Or none. Perhaps we're avatars in a simulation crafted by a sleep-deprived programmer from another dimension. Who knows? That's the beauty of mysteries-endless exploration.
Storytelling is my passion and refuge. Fantasy is home-a realm of infinite magic-though I wander into other genres when inspired. Some days, I piece together existence's secrets; others, I embrace creation's chaos. Writing is both a mirror of life's mysteries and a celebration of its wild, untamed spirit.
Want to chat about fanfiction, gaming theories, life's quirks, or cosmic enigmas? Join AgentT's server: https://discord.gg/vYKkHvtx. If I vanish like a rogue in the shadows, don't worry-I'm probably off chasing a magical adventure. After all, isn't every journey-cosmic or otherwise-just another chapter in the universe's infinite story?

title: Cara Mía - Remus Lupin (English ver)
description:
In the bustling year of 1993, Hogwarts hides not only secrets within its halls but also emotions that should never have arisen. Remus Lupin, the new Defense Against the Dark Arts professor, battles his own demons while trying to guide his students through an increasingly dark world. But everything changes when he meets Elizabeth Potter, the daughter of his former best friends and Harry Potter's twin sister-"the children who survived"-a brilliant and sweet mind with a past full of scars that mirror his own.

Through a chance encounter in Diagon Alley, lessons, and moonlit nights, an unexpected connection blooms, built on shared understanding, dusty books, and a bond that defies all norms. As the dangers outside grow, both must decide if it's worth risking everything for a connection as forbidden as it is intense.

Can they find light in the shadows? Or will they be consumed by the darkness that surrounds them?

Their story is heartbreaking, their love is immortal, their legacy lives on.

What if i told you that their story is real? How they lived, died, loved....... 

(Note: This is originally a poem written nearly 2000 years ago in Arabia, there have been many rewrites of it and there are many different perspectives or parts of the story depending on where you live in the middle east. This book will be based on the more widely agreed on facts about the story but most of it will be my own imagination. Enjoy.)

title: The course of echoes
description:
Dante's life at Academia Veritatis, a prestigious yet mysterious university, was meant to be a fresh start-a place to immerse himself in his studies and poetry. Instead, he finds himself plagued by vivid nightmares, strange symbols, and an unshakable pull toward forbidden areas of the campus. His path intertwines with Elias Noctis, a captivating and enigmatic student whose connection to Dante feels both fated and dangerous.
As the two uncover hidden secrets about the university's past-and themselves-they realize they are bound by a curse rooted in love, loss, and betrayal. Together, they must navigate a labyrinth of dreams, ancient mysteries, and forbidden love to break the cycle and reclaim their lives.
But in a world where nothing is as it seems, can love truly overcome the shadows of the past? Or will the echoes of history repeat themselves, tearing them apart forever?
The Course of Echoes is a spellbinding tale of love, destiny, and self-discovery set against a backdrop of academia and dark intrigue.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi there! I'm C.L Darkwell, a storyteller passionate about crafting tales that stir the soul and spark the imagination. I write about mysterious worlds, impossible loves, and characters who discover their strength in adversity.

When I'm not writing, you'll probably find me devouring books, daydreaming, or creating playlists for every chapter of my stories.

I hope my words become a place where you can dream, reflect, and, most importantly, enjoy.
Feel free to comment and share your thoughts-I'd love to hear from you!

Favorite Genres: Fantasy, romance, mystery, and a dash of drama.
My Goals: To write stories that resonate with you and leave a small mark on your heart. I also write in Spanish so you'd often see two versions of my story <33

title: Fault Lines Of Us
description:
A story about a somewhat forbidden love for the eyes of everyone. Cedric Anderson, a rising actor tells the story of when his world collided with the Oscar-winning child Actor, Seth Fields. 

They run; they hide just to feel each other amidst the chaos of everything. As an actor and having your face plastered on posters and billboards around the cities, it's not easy to have privacy. Every move you take, there are eyes watching you. And so they found their safe zone in each other's presence. As years go by and fame gets rusty, all they have left is memory. 

With the vivid memory, Cedric tells us the story about two simple men, set aside the fame. Just them against the world.

"This is the story of us-- This is where I hide behind the eyes."

title: ~•~ Off Balance ~•~
description:
"Maybe he was just meant to destroy you."

Because there's only so much that we can do when we are off balance. 

I hate to give so much credit to a single person who has so much control over my heart, but I can't not thank them, for I would not have so many words to share with all of you. Off Balance is my first collection of micro poetry, free-verse, short excerpts, quotes, and prose poetry. It is my home away from home, and the place where all the feelings I want to share with that one person go, but that I just don't have the courage to actually share. I hope that it can provide some sentiment to you as well.
