title: Grime Music in Cockaigne
description:
"My next project will have a similar vibe to playing Grime Music in Cockaigne, the rhymes will be as zany as people with lime tunics 'n' no names and they'll be fragrantly scented with thyme, tulips 'n' propane ugh!...."

Welcome to Cockaigne, the archaic land of eternal paradise.

An imaginary place of luxury and ease, comfort and pleasure, opposite to the harshness of medieval peasant life. It is a land of contraries, where all the restrictions of society are defied, sexual liberty is open and food is plentiful.

This project is will subject you to the feeling of plying Grime Music in Cockaigne, Drill Music in Zion,  Horrorcore Music in Heaven or Crunk Music in Valhalla.

That disruption of tranquility with a cacophony of entrancing lyrical creativity.

An escape from the monotony of paradise, a much needed sabbatical from the unparalleled norm of immortality, a greatly appreciated interruption to the tedious continuum of eternal existence, a refreshing ambience in the background of infinite bliss.

So join me as we delve deeper into the bizarre, the majestic, the eye opening, the spine tingling, the scintillating, the tantalising, the methodical, the cultivating, the captivating, the elegant, the mischievous, the mesmerising, the thought provoking, the controversial, the striking , the breathtaking and the imperious world of lyricism!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Light in the Dark (Completed)
description:
Cover made by the amazing @mikeyspizzadope (go check them out they're cool) 

It's 3 A.M., and you can't sleep. Your heart feels like it might burst out of your chest. Your ears are ringing, echoing in your brain, and everything hurts so badly. Your vision is going blurry as you try to fight back the tears, and you're wondering why you even try anymore. 

At one point or another, most of us have experienced the feeling of worthlessness, shame, or guilt. We feel like we're at rock bottom, and it seems like nothing will ever get any better no matter how hard we try. 

One thing we do know for sure, though, is that where there is dark, there is bound to be light, no matter how small that speck may be. There's always hope, no matter how far out of reach it may seem. There's always light in the dark. 

TW/CW: mentions of anxiety, depression, suicidal thoughts.

"I know that even when things seem dark and at rock bottom, there's always hope. There's always a light at the end of the tunnel. As small as that little shaft of light may seem, it's not out of reach." 
- something a friend of mine once told me 

All of the poems in this book have been written by me.

Completed on August 22, 2020
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Days With No Sun
description:
Sometimes we fear truth over reality. But things get dark and heavy and we play the blame game. We end up hurting others or ourselves even. We don't think before we act or we don't say before we do.

This is the evolution of my madness.

A cluster of rants and thoughts and poems for you guys. Everything is written how I wanted it to be rants will be long with few pauses and there will be mistakes I might have skipped over. Aha. Poems at the beginning from when I was 15 years old to now when Im 18. Truly a visual of my writing evolution. 

Edited by @ChemicalStarling who writes a lot but never posts!

Read on, loves. I'll see you on the other side...

I don't like bios. I mean, I'm literally so amazing that it's impossible to sum it up into two thousand characters.

I love mushrooms. Yeah it's weird, I know, get over it.

I'm the go-to person for advice amongst my friends, unfortunately. Do I give off a psychologist vibe? Do I? Do I?

I have ridiculously curly hair that will probably be the death of me one day, when it strangles me in my sleep.

I have commitment problems. Yeah, I know, I shouldn't air all my dirty laundry out but they're the main reason I'm on Wattpad. I'm trying to overcome them by finishing a book.
Like they're so bad, that I can't be on Facebook or Twitter because I get bored.

I'm probably the world's best procrastinator. Any tips on how to be the world's worst?

I love to read (if you don't, you shouldn't be here!!!). If I could, I would live in the bookstore. Alas, reading has adverse effects on my education and social life like the sorry-I-never replied-to-your-text-messages kind of effects.

And I know I said I hate bios-I still do-but I got a bit carried away with this one.
***

title: Adonis
description:
[ BACK IN 2023 ]

One cold morning, Simon meets a boy with starry eyes and poetry-wreathed lips, and that is when their tragedy begins.

***

Simon Huang's a quiet loner with dreams of being on stage. Too scared to disappoint his overbearing, grade-focused parents, he forces himself to stick to books instead of scripts. Then he meets his Literature professor's son, and all that changes.

For piano prodigy Vincent Kelle, failure is not an option. Gifted from birth, he prides himself on dominating all the competitions he participates in with a giant smile on his face. After his mother enrolls him in a piano competition outside London, he's forced to fly to America to stay with his estranged father until further notice. Determined to win the contest and head back home immediately after, he's intent on getting out of America as fast as possible. Then he meets his father's star student, and all that changes.

When a boy who's afraid to try meets a boy who's afraid to fail, there's only two ways it can go. It'll end in heartbreak---or maybe they can rewrite the stars.

[ UPDATES ON SATURDAYS, 9AM EST ]

title: My Moon (PUBLISHED UNDER TBC PUBLICATIONS)
description:
Every night, I look at you
Seeking your light outside my window
Hoping that you'll show up once more
While I'll write a poem as you glow.

Poems live in this book
Ones of unsaid emotions

When I'm with you. 
When I'm alone.
Love that won't end soon
Now that I can already call you my own.

You will forever be, My Moon...

title: Better Comes After The Worst (Re Written)
description:
Love Without Trust Is Like A River Without Water.

Tumhe pata hai Tara. Maa humesha kehti thi...

Dhruv trailed off looking at the moon with a sigh.

Kya?

Tara asked softly placing a hand on his shoulder which he removed. Tara sighed.

Ke vachan kanch ke hote hain toot jate hain. Magar vishvaas Sada rehta hai.

Dhruv said emotionlessly. He gazed at the moon with a hollow look in his eyes.

A pin drop silence enveloped them. Tara started to rub her arms in discomfort.

Per yahan toh vishvaas hi kanch ka nikla.

Dhruv said and her heart stopped beating as she looked at him. He stood emotionless which prickled her already broken heart mercilessly.

There's a saying, that love without trust is like a river without water.

Dhruv Tara were 2 people who loved each other to the moon and back but due to 1 misunderstanding, everything was ruined between them. Dhruv lost his ability to trust while Tara lost him in the most cruel of ways.

Based after Maharaj Udeybhan,s death and after his innocence was proven.

authorBio:
Olan L. Smith was born in Huntsville, Missouri in 1953. He graduated from Westran High School in 1971 and went on to receive two degrees in higher education.  He graduated in 1978 from Northwest Christian College in Eugene Oregon with a B.S. degree, and a Master's degree from Northwest Missouri State University in Maryville, Missouri.  Olan first published poetry in 1985 in two literary publications; Earthwise, University of Miami, Florida, and Alura Poetry, Vol. X, No 2 Fall, 1985; Minnesota.  Other published poems from Olan L. Smith (Cotton Jones) can be found in Poetry Train America, by John E. Wordslinger (edited by Charles H. Gragg), 2013; The Universe Inside; Editor Eva Xanithopoulos, 2012.

title: Kāvyamālya: A Garland of Poetry
description:
Andal secretly wears Vishnu's garland before the garland touches His chest.

Krishna sports a fragrant garland of forest flowers in the beautiful boughs of Vrindavan.

Vishnu rests eternally on His serpent bed in His divine form, meditating and granting bliss to all His devotees, a beautiful garland adorning His chest where the Fortune Goddess resides.

This humble being can only string a garland of words, if not of fragrant flowers and beads. What can you offer the Lord when everything is His creation, when everything belongs to Him?

These garlands, these fruits, and jewels are all His. My words, these strung sentences, and this art is all His.
Just as You accepted the garlands of Your beloveds, may I find this Kāvyamālya around Your neck, O Lord?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A pharmacy student by day, a dancer in the evening, a writer by night, and a dreamer forever.

I am Samridhi. With my ghungroos, journals, and earphones that constantly play classical music, I love spending my time amongst nature and temples.

My works are based on Indian history, dance, mythology, and philosophy. The books below are a little production of my creative self, reflecting a journey of my own thoughts and ideas while growing up and watching the world around me.

title: Whispers of Azure: Tales of Friendship, Love, and Faith
description:
Whispers of Azure: Tales of Friendship, Love, and Faith is a collection of heartfelt poems that celebrate the beauty of life's journey through the lens of friendship, love, and faith. Each poem weaves together themes of joy, companionship, and the power of belief, drawing inspiration from the vivid imagery of the color blue and the whimsical charm of characters like Stitch. From the warmth of teatime gatherings to the exploration of culinary delights, the book invites readers to savor the precious moments and connections that make life truly meaningful. Through lyrical verses and tender reflections, it offers a journey of inspiration, comfort, and hope, resonating with readers who cherish the magic found in everyday moments.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
THANKS YOU ALL.

Thanks to my best friend who encouraged me to start writing again.
- With love.

title: Realities
description:
So many words in my head 
Dreams, painted scenes, poetry 
Waiting to be heard
Waiting to be read.....

"through blood, sweat and tears she proves she's not inadequate
hiding behind similes and metaphors 
Adapting and transforming the very definition of these words 
Communicating her strength to the universe"
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Love a girl who writes,
and lives her many lives;
you have yet to find her,
beneath her words of guise,
kiss her blue-inked fingers,
forgive the pen they marked,
The stain of your lips upon her-
the one she can't  discard.
Forget her tattered memories,
or the pages others took;
you are her ever after,
the hero of her book.
_Lang Leav

title: Edgar Allan Poe's Most Famous Works
description:
From The Raven to The Tell Tale Heart, Poe's grim and gruesome greatest hits.
----
Edgar Allan Poe (January 19, 1809 to October 7, 1849) was an American writer, poet, critic and editor best known for evocative short stories and poems that captured the imagination and interest of readers around the world. His imaginative storytelling and tales of mystery and horror gave birth to the modern detective story.

authorBio:

title: Louder than silence | INFJ
description:
Step inside the mind of an INFJ-the "rare" personality that's as misunderstood as it is intense. This isn't just a book; it's a raw dive into the world of deep thoughts, quiet strength, and unapologetic honesty. Here, you'll find poems, quotes, and short stories crafted from personal experience and, yes, a bit of sass.

An INFJ is a mix of fire and calm, mystery and meaning, and if you're ready to explore the things most people miss or misunderstand...you've come to the right place. But fair warning: this book isn't here to fit in or play nice. It's here to tell it like it is, one introspective thought at a time. Ready to go beyond the surface?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: mind is a strange, beautiful place-full of intense emotions, hidden thoughts, and a quiet fire that rarely fades.

authorBio: Horror, mystery, fiction, non-fiction, romance, action, adventure, poetry, fairytales. I can write and create pretty much anything as long as it's fictional. I put my emotions into my writing and get inspiration from all my feelings. I can only write non-fiction if I just experienced it and then put it into my writing. I'm also hoping to have one of my manuscripts turned into a TV show or movie someday soon. We'll see.

title: In Memory
description:
Poetry and Flash Fiction Collection. 

My mom was a writer and a poet. After her death, I inherited all of her notes, finished and unfinished work that she never got to share with the world.

This collection started as my interpretations, reflections, feelings, and thoughts about her writing, life and how she impacted mine. 

Now it's whatever comes to mind: life, death, motherhood, childhood, love, and everything in between.  


March 18th, 2020 #126 in #deathandlife
March 27th, 2020 #873 in #writing 
April 4th, 2020 #30 in #wordsofwisdom, #513 in #mother

Cover is based on an image by Gerd Altmann from Pixabay

title: || 𝑷𝑶𝑬𝑴𝑺 ||
description:
★ ᴡ ᴇ ʟ ᴄ ᴏ ᴍ ᴇ ★



I'm so excited to share my new book with you all. It's a collection of my poems and photos, and it's all about the beauty of the world around us.
I've been writing poems for a long time, and I've always loved taking pictures. I started taking pictures of sunsets and sunrises, and I was amazed at how beautiful they were. I started taking pictures of everything I saw, and I realized that there is beauty in everything.
I've included some of my favorite poems and photos in this book. I hope you enjoy reading them as much as I enjoyed writing and taking them.
I'm still learning how to write and take pictures, but I'm so happy to share my work with you all. I hope you'll follow my journey as I continue to grow as a writer and photographer.
I am so happy to share my poems with you all. I love writing about my feelings, and I hope my words can touch your heart.
I have always been a creative person, and writing is my favorite way to express myself. I love the way words can paint pictures in your mind and make you feel things deeply.
I write about love, loss, joy, and sadness. I write about the beauty of the world around us and the complexities of human emotions.
I hope you enjoy reading my poems as much as I enjoyed writing them.


Thank you for reading.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Suicide Diary.
description:
This is a diary about how fucked up my brain is.

HUGE TRIGGER WARNING.

I will be talking about self harm, suicide, eating disorders, phobias, mental illness, sexual assault and there will be cursing among other things. If you are easily triggered or do not like these topics please do not read this.

This is not fiction, these are actual thoughts and I might also be talking about actual events as well. Please note that I am an adult and of legal age.

Despite what the title implies this is not a suicide note. Consider this my Hannah Baker tapes without the actual suicide.

This will be written in a poetic writing style.

I doubt anyone will read this. But if anyone does. I hope you enjoy my messy mind and messy life.

title: But your my maid
description:
He laughed darkly,"you know what? Was this your plan? Make me fall in love and string me along?"

"No Jacob i love you." I cried.

"You don't love me, did you fuck him Kandy?,"he spat,"you know what my parents were fucking right, your just some fucking child that can't keep her legs shut, better yet did he fuck you better than me, I mean by the looks of it, I surely can say I fucked you good by the way you be screaming and cumming arou-"

I slapped him as tears fell down my face.
***

Kandy is 17 a only child with the weight of the world on top of her head having her dead beat dad passed away leaving her and her mother in debt now she has to find a job to help her out.

Jacob is 25, rich, tall, built and every girls dream with the money and fame he has the power to destroy anything he wants not to mention that he owns all the gambling houses in the country. 


What happens when richy rich needs a maid and poory poor applied for the position??

title: In Our Time of War
description:
🏆 SHORTLIST - OPEN NOVELLA CONTEST 2024 🏆

A young journalist must navigate a war-torn country and the intricacy of first love in order to save herself and her family.
                                                                          	⋯⋯⋯
In 2042, invaders crossed Philippine waters and marked the start of the war. Two years later, Maian Dizon, a displaced Metro Manila journalist, navigates the war-torn streets in search of a way out of the country. However, when her path crosses with Kian Lucero, a reservist medical doctor, doubts creep in. With the guilt he carries, the foreboding loss on her shoulders, and the pressing needs of her family, her calling points her back to her homeland with no promise of salvation. But the attacks crawl closer every day, and Maian must devise a plan to save the people she loves, even if it means sacrificing herself.

From the award-winning author of 𝘞𝘩𝘦𝘯 𝘓𝘢𝘴𝘵 𝘕𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘋𝘪𝘥𝘯'𝘵 𝘌𝘯𝘥 comes a story of love and life, and how they fade and thrive at the face of war. There is an end to peace, memory, and glory, but there are things that will live forever. We only have to find them.

title: Flowers Have Thorns Too
description:
HIGHEST RANK #47 in Poetry

For years, I have taken pleasure in crippling others' happiness, like crushing a butterfly between your fingers, it is satisfying but sadly addictive. You see,  pain is always lethal, it is there, standing proud and ready to show your true intentions to a world of good born souls, especially, happy girls. They always attract me, for I have never been able to stay away from damaging their whiteness. Their pink rose cheeks turning pale from their salty tears is my favorite piece of art.

The truth is-I was not born bad...I had been born innocent, yet life had already made me a monster. A young caged flower is inside me, poisoned, waiting to be rescued by magic. But my thorns are faster to destroy anyone who is willing to save me. 

Flowers have thorns too, and not even poetry can describe how insufferable my truth is.

This book is a poetry collection of confessions made by a troubled person who's spent most of his life destroying everything on his way. This book gives you the opportunity to be inside the bad guy's head, entirely. 

Read and try not to cringe.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: A Crown and Chains
description:
In a kingdom ruled by power and status, love blossoms in the shadows where it is least expected-between a king burdened by his throne and a slave bound by chains. A Crown and Chains is a poignant tale of forbidden love, whispered desires, and the unrelenting weight of fear and duty. Through lyrical verses, this poem explores the fragile beauty of love in the face of societal constraints and the aching pain of hearts kept apart.

A debut piece that dives into the depths of human connection, sacrifice, and the quiet rebellion of two souls against the cruel hands of fate.

Where I've been

My life.

Dreams & Nightmares.

authorBio:
🌺Call me Kal🌺 I'm an avid outdoorswoman and lifelong writer, with 19 years of storytelling experience and several published works. I find inspiration in my adventurous lifestyle and the places I've lived. My favorite books, like Gone with the Wind and Jane Eyre, inspire my love for rich detail and vivid landscapes, while sci-fi favorites like John Carter of Mars and the DeathStalker series spark my imagination.

Currently, I'm hard at work on books 2, 3, and 4 of my published series. After 12 years of moving and connecting with diverse people, I often find it challenging to meet fellow writers who share my passion. My goal is to bridge that gap and connect with other like-minded creatives.


🌺please leave me a vote if you like my content🤙

Otherwise let's be respectful and not spam people's work. K

title: The World XXI
description:
This collection is born from the quiet hours, where silence weighs heavy, and the shadows cast by memory grow long. Each poem is a fragment of grief, a reflection of loss, and an echo of the fragile beauty that often accompanies sadness. In these words, you will find the slow unraveling of heartache, the tenderness of longing, and the delicate dance between despair and hope.

This is not a book meant to lift spirits, but to cradle the sorrow we often carry alone. Let these verses be a companion for those dark nights when the world feels distant, and you seek solace in the depths of your own heart. Here, in the stillness of these pages, may you find the truth in pain and perhaps, the small comfort that comes in knowing you are not alone. From one lost soul to another, allow me to be free.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Sweet Misery: Heartbreak Confessions
description:
Hi there! My name is Clara Salazar and welcome to my songbook! Here you'll have the opportunity to be he first to read my original lyrics that'll be released on my 2026 debut album, Sweet Misery, and it's deluxe version, Sweet Misery: Heartbreak Confessions.

I've been wanting to be a singer/songwriter ever since I was 13 and wattpad has truly impacted me because before I got this app, I would've never realized this was what I was meant to do in life. Now I'm 18 and doing everything I can to accomplish that goal. I want to thank my closest friends on this app who have supported me non-stop and I owe it all to you guys. Without you, I wouldn't persevere as much. Because of you, the future is bright and clear. Without you, life would be sweet misery. I will love you eternally <3

title: Will & Indie
description:
William Whitlock, an aspiring poet and hopeless romantic, believes that running into star-strikingly beautiful Indie Argyle in Redding's Bookstore was no accident. Will chases after the girl of his dreams until he can finally call her his own; however, between his complicated home life and Indie's own secrecy, the pair of young lovers realize that maybe love isn't all sunshine and roses. Will their love withstand the tests of time, grief, and life, or is their poem one not meant to be shared?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello fellow readers and writers! I'm Sam, and I'm so excited to be able to share the stories inside my head with all of you.
Be sure to check out my stories, Will & Indie and Of Fairies and Noontime, and be on the lookout for new projects in the near future! I hope that you enjoy your visit to my creative kingdom! Best wishes to all!

title: Map of Scars and Stars | poems
description:
Map of Scars and Stars is an intimate journey through the labyrinth of a life shaped by love, longing, and loss. Told in raw, poetic fragments, it traces the contours of joy and trauma from childhood to the present. Each page weaves together the scars that bear the weight of survival and the stars that guide the way to hope and healing. With delicate strength, this collection unveils a soul unafraid to confront its depths and celebrate its light.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Writer of worlds where love is both complex and poetic.

I write of love in its rawest forms-its tenderness, its ache, its power to both wound and heal. My words trace the invisible scars of the past, the delicate balance between longing and release, and the quiet strength found in moments of vulnerability.

Through poetry and prose, I explore the beauty and cruelty of the world, the echoes of memories that linger, and the fragile hope that grows in unexpected places. My stories are a reflection of the heart's resilience, a search for meaning in both the shadows and the light.

For those drawn to the intensity of feeling, the depth of words, and the quiet magic of understanding-welcome.

title: LIFE IN VERSES
description:
Ang bawat kabanatang nito ay naglalarawan ng isang masalimuot at malungkot na pagninilay sa buhay ng isang tao na dumaan sa matinding sakit at kabiguan. Ang bawat hakbang at desisyon na ginawa ay nagdulot ng mga sugat at pagkatalo, na nagbabalik sa kanya ng mga alaala ng mga pangarap na hindi natupad at mga pagkakataong pinalagpas. Sa kabila ng lahat ng sakit na nararamdaman, ang pangunahing tema ng kabanatang ito ay ang pagtanggap sa kabiguan at ang hindi maiiwasang epekto nito sa buhay ng isang tao.

Pinapakita ng kabanatang ito ang malalim na kalungkutan na dulot ng mga hindi natupad na pangarap, mga relasyon na nagbigo, at ang pakiramdam ng pagiging naligaw sa landas. Sa sukdulang paghihirap, ang pangunahing tauhan ay nakakaranas ng kawalan ng lunas sa kanyang mga sugat at tanong na hindi matutugunan. Ang mga kabiguan ay nagiging bahagi ng kanyang pagkatao, at siya'y nagsisimulang tanggapin na ang mga sakit ng nakaraan ay hindi na mababago, at walang garantiya ng tagumpay.

Ang kabanatang ito ay puno ng malupit na pagmumuni at ang hindi matitinag na pakiramdam ng pagkatalo. Gayunpaman, sa kabila ng lahat ng ito, ang pagninilay ay nagsisilbing paalala na sa mga pagkatalo at sakit, may kalakip na aral na nagsasabi na hindi lahat ng bagay sa buhay ay kontrolado, at minsan, ang pagtanggap sa kabiguan ay ang tanging hakbang upang magpatuloy sa buhay.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Maligayang pagdating sa aking mundo ng mga salita! Ako ang tagapagsalaysay ng mga kwentong humuhugot sa tunay na buhay-mga tagumpay, kabiguan, luha, at ngiti. Naniniwala ako na bawat paglalakbay, gaano man kahirap, ay may dalang aral at liwanag. 

Sumama sa akin sa pagsilip sa mga istoryang hinabi mula sa reyalidad-mga simpleng pangarap, malalalim na sugat, at walang sawang pagbangon. Sana'y makita mo ang iyong sarili sa bawat pahina at maramdaman ang init ng pag-asa. 

**Genre:** 
✨ Drama 
✨ Slice of Life 
✨ Inspirational 

**Follow me:** 
📩 Huwag mag-atubiling mag-iwan ng komento o mensahe. Tara, mag-usap tayo ng buhay!

title: Kaleidoscope
description:
Everyone is beautiful in a way that's their own.

A metaphorical take on the entire spectrum of beauty we've found in the Indian cricket team over the years.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Long off...long off...LONG OFFFFFFFFF...SURYAKUMAR YADAV."

"I am only believe on Jassi bhai because game changer player he is only one guy is the Jasprit Bumrah."
~ Mohammed Siraj (and whole of India and certainly me)

"You don't get to choose whether you get hurt in this world, but you do have some say in who hurts you."
~Augustus Waters

I love the 2013 Indian team more than my life: Rohit, Jinks, Jaddu, Virat, Bhuvi and Ash, my forever 6. Also Jassi, Hardik, KulCha, Dhawan, Mayank, KLR...list won't end. I wouldn't take any cool, even World Cup winning team over them, because this team is my life, and I love my choice.

Happiest days of my life: 23rd June 2013 and more recently, 19th Jan 2021

"We are the Knights. We fight." 💜💛 Nothing makes me prouder than to wear purple and say 'I support my home team.' If you support your home team, you'd know.

To me, 83 is everything warm and sweet and beautiful and heartwarming. To me, 83 is the safe space we all need in our lives. What 83 is to me can't be expressed, neither in writing nor by saying, it can just be felt. If you're lucky. If you've found your 83.

"My wives, my kinsmen, my relatives, none amongst these is dearer to me than Arjuna. O Daruka, I shall not be able to cast my eyes, even for a single moment, on the earth bereft of Arjuna."

💛 Krishna-Arjuna for life 💛

I
~Obsess with platonic friendships~
~Live for Indian cricket's and KKR's glory~
~Watch no movie apart from 83~
~Read 50 books a year~
~Can quote Harry Potter word by word~
~Would spend my whole life writing, and just writing~

Other account: @Marmonomia264

title: teenage mind - poetry
description:
Being a teenager is a wild ride, right? One moment, you're head-over-heels in love, and the next, you're crying over heartbreak. You're figuring out who you are, dealing with insecurities, navigating family drama, chasing independence, and wondering if your friends are your forever crew-or just passing through.

"Teenage Mind" dives headfirst into all the chaos, beauty, and raw emotions of growing up. It's a collection of poems straight from the heart-sometimes messy, sometimes beautiful, but always real.

If you've ever felt like your mind's a battlefield of emotions (thanks, hormones), this book gets it. It's not here to judge-it's here to tell you that you're not alone. So grab a cozy spot, hit play on your favorite sad playlist, and let "Teenage Mind" remind you that even in the madness, there's magic.

Because, let's be honest, being a teenager isn't easy. But it's worth writing poetry about. ❤️
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi babes:)

I found my love for writing poetry when I was in a dark period of my life, the only way I felt heard was by writing everything down. So I decided to bundle everything that I've felt up into a poetry collection called 'Teenage Mind'.

I hope you guys like it and can connect with some of the poems.
IT'S OUT, you can buy the epub version on my Etsy!!
https://bellsflowerpoetry.etsy.com/nl/listing/1794635924/tienergeest-poezie

I love you, you've got this xx

title: And Love Withers Away...
description:
Is it true that love is ever lasting , stays forever? Maybe it is , but these days those who love each other are not together & those who are together maybe do not always truly love one another ... When the initial spark or glitter fades away , does everything remain same in a relationship ? Or does something....change? These poems are from the viewpoint of a woman who feels in her heart that a change is happening , in everything ... Or maybe everything is the same but it's all in her head? Read the poems to experience a whirlwind of emotions that the poet goes through as she pens this down .

title: Her shadow, Forever mine.
description:
I am the quiet thing you never notice-the outline at your feet, the echo that clings to your light. This is my story, one of love unspoken and presence unseen. I stay with her, stretching and twisting to fit her world, but when she reaches for the dark, I vanish. I am here, even when she forgets me. Read these words, and maybe, just maybe, you'll remember the shadows that love you too.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: This page ? It's a reflection of what you can't understand. Every tear, every sigh, it's all a game, a mask, a lie that only a monster wears. You think it's sorrow? It's not. It's the thrill of watching you crumble beneath the weight of my emptiness. I don't feel the pain-I am the pain. And in my world, I'm the only truth that matters.

authorBio: Hi! I'm just a teenage girl (savage 17) who loves to read and commute her feelings through writing. I think there are a lot of people who can't describe how they are feeling so I write for them as well, to make them understand what the are actually feeling through words and that they are not alone in this suffering. I want to spread love, love for books, for poems and stories and most of all the love for humanity. So here I am.

title: Behind My Eyes.
description:
come pick my mind and stay awhile, make yourself comfortable. it's awfully lonely in here.
      -
      inside this book, you'll find five distinct parts: simply me, which tells you almost everything you need to know about me. you, which tells you about my experience with love and the state of bliss it brings you. after you, which tells you about my experience with heartbreak and hate. nightmares, which is every scary thing that occurs in my mind and things that instill fear in those who read it. the book closes with recovery, where we explore self-confidence and self-discovery. these are the inner workings of my mind, i'm not going to sugar coat it for you: it's a sad, depressing place. this all comes from the pages of my journals so i'm sparing you the tear-stained pages, consider yourself lucky. hope you enjoy!
      -
      feel free to comment or message me :)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Maid & The Vampire
description:
Hazel's life coudnt be any worse. It feels almost impossible to live with the dreams she has. The work she wants to do as a poet doesnt work out next to her job as an maid. Her boss: lord Oliver of Marigold, is irresistably hot, but also annoying and incompetent. It looks like hes only watching her and pointing at every little mistake she makes. Ofcourse Hazel crushes on him, but she also doesnt want too. Hes too irritating and its not even possible to be with him in an relationship, Or is it?...

ps english is not my first language so my appoligies if there are any mistakes, feel free to correct me <3

description:
𝐕𝐞𝐥𝐯𝐞𝐭 𝐑𝐚𝐠𝐞. 

A tapestry of 𝘱𝘢𝘪𝘯, 𝘳𝘦𝘴𝘪𝘭𝘪𝘦𝘯𝘤𝘦, and 𝘳𝘦𝘥𝘦𝘮𝘱𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯, 𝘝𝘦𝘭𝘷𝘦𝘵 𝘙𝘢𝘨𝘦 unveils the raw truths of a life forged in struggle. This poetry book is not just a collection of words, it's a journey through the bruises of the soul, the scars of the heart, and the beauty that rises from the ashes. With every page, emotions bleed through, from the piercing ache of betrayal to the tender embrace of self love.

𝐕𝐞𝐥𝐯𝐞𝐭 𝐑𝐚𝐠𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐚 𝐭𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐫𝐞. 𝐈𝐭 𝐝𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐬 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐨 𝐟𝐞𝐞𝐥 𝐝𝐞𝐞𝐩𝐥𝐲, 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐝𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐛𝐞𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐲 𝐨𝐟 𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐯𝐚𝐥.

title: Poetry about "You"
description:
~Like all good things 
come to an end
this one did too 

Like all shooting stars 
Hit the ground
And shatter 
My heart did too

But what hurts 
the most is
I was the only one
hurting~

___________________________________________


~The Dragon flies were bustling all around on the gaudy purple wings

Butterflies searching for sweetness from the flowers

That garden was now my soul And you were the heart of my garden~

___________________________________________

In the end,
we will not remember the hurtful words of our enemies
But, the never-ending silence of our friends 
Poetry about a Journey from friends to Strangers with memories.

-a journey of moving on and healing
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Trailing Stars (Trailing Stars #1)
description:
For Mona's upcoming sixteenth birthday, there's only one thing she really wants: to get it over with. But with her family coming to visit her and her older sister for winter break, all she can do is listen to their suggestions and hope time passes quickly. The only problem is time seems to be at a complete standstill since Mona won't be celebrating her birthday with her twin brother for the first time in her life.

The next best thing? Deflect the conversations and hope for the best. Mona's been doing exactly that for the last few months. What're a couple more weeks until her birthday passes? But when she meets Nathan and Clara, she finds that a couple of weeks of deflecting conversations and hoping for the best isn't going to cut it. Not with them, and not with herself either.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: petrarch | h.s.
description:
"Love is the crowning grace of humanity, the holiest right of the soul, the golden link which binds us to duty and truth, the redeeming principle that chiefly reconciles the heart of life and is prophetic of eternal good."

"Francesco Petrarca?"

"Also known as Petrarch."

• in which the 28 year old rockstar takes a chance on a more mature relationship with a 19 year old secretary of Juliet Capulet  

~ sequel of shakespeare | h.s.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Dear Claire,
     'What' and 'If' are two words as non-threatening as words can be. But put them together side-by-side and they have the power to haunt you for the rest of your life: What if? What if? What if?
     I don't know how your story ended but if what you felt then was true love, then it's never too late. If it was true then, why wouldn't it be true now? You need only the courage to follow your heart.
     I don't know what a love like Juliet's feels like - love to leave loved ones for, love to cross oceans for but I'd like to believe if I ever were to feel it, that I will have the courage to seize it.
      And, Claire, if you didn't, I hope one day that you will.
All my love, Juliet
/Letters to Juliet - 2010/

~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*

title: 101 Poems About Him
description:
"𝘈𝘯𝘥 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘸𝘢𝘺 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘩𝘶𝘳𝘵,
𝘐𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘸𝘢𝘺 𝘮𝘺 𝘩𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘵 𝘮𝘰𝘶𝘳𝘯𝘴.
𝘠𝘰𝘶 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦𝘥 𝘴𝘰𝘮𝘦𝘰𝘯𝘦; 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘤𝘢𝘯'𝘵 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦.
𝘛𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘦 𝘐 𝘸𝘢𝘴, 𝘸𝘩𝘰 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘤𝘢𝘯'𝘵 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦."

Have you ever been in love with someone who can't see you as the way you see them?
This is a collection of a hundred and one poems for him. He is not a type of a man who would sit and read poetry but then, this poetry is way of expressing hidden feelings that are buried deep inside.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Favorite Part ✔
description:
Buku itu telah usang,
Kenangan yang dulu kupunya tandus dan gersang.
Sampai akhirnya kamu datang.

Kamu selalu bilang,
Di masa muda kita sekarang,
Kamu akan membuat memori indah untuk kukenang.

Tapi, Raja...
Berapa banyak air mata yang harus kubuang?
Jika suatu saat nanti, gerhana kita tidak akan kembali datang?
Matahari yang selalu berada di Kota Siang,
Dan aku, Bulan yang malang kembali kesepian di antara ribuan bintang.

/Ayuni P/

title: Dreamland Library
description:
Have you ever read a book that you absolutely loved and just wanted to share with the world? Well, here is the place for you!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Every great dream begins with a dreamer. Always remember, you have within you the strength, the patience, and the passion to reach for the stars to change the world."

-- Harriet Tubman

Close your eyes.  Take a deep breath.  Relax.  Feel yourself start to drift off. Lose yourself in a wonderful, blissful space with doors all around.  Open the one before you.  And, finally, take your first step into our little place of dreams.

Hello, potential Dreamer, and welcome to DreamlandCommunity.  While here, we hope to provide you with a friendly place to share and grow your stories, as well as create connections that will make Wattpad as enjoyable an experience as possible for you.

All are welcome.  No matter the type of dream -- new or old, bold or reserved, serious or for fun -- we aim to give it a place to spread its wings and soar.  How do we do this?  We have many portals for you to step through, which can be found by exploring the books on our profile.

Now that we have established what we do, we recommend looking at Dreamland Community, the book, to see just who we are!

If you're interested in becoming a Dreamer, be sure to check out the different portals.  Those in our club get access to an optional discord server :)

Finally, we have a secondary account for various community-focused events that are not clubs.  You can find that account here: @DreamlandOutreach

I believe that is all.  We hope you join us, and remember: never stop dreaming!

Discord Link: https://discord.gg/dreamlandcommunity

title: To be an Animal
description:
¿How would it be like to really belong to nature? ¿How would it be like to see everything from the eyes of other living beings? This is a little travel to think about it. I hope you enjoy it, I accept every comment and I'm grateful for those who give me some feedback.


¿Cómo sería ser realmente parte de la naturaleza? ¿Cómo sería ver todo desde los ojos de otros seres vivos? Este texto es un pequeño viaje para pensar y reflexionar sobre ello. Espero que les guste, estoy abierta a todos los comentarios y aprecio consejos.
Attribution Creative Commons (CC)
authorBio: Hola, soy Ruth. Hace poco descubrí mi interés por escribir, creo que es una manera alucinante de expresarse sin hablar. Y, ¿Quién sabe? Tal vez sea buena en ello. Estoy abierta a todos los comentarios y aprecio consejos para seguir creciendo. Gracias por pasarse por aquí

title: My Liberation Poems
description:
This is the kind of poems you all want to read, 
A story of a little girl, a teenage, a young lady and a woman;
Aspiring to be liberated from an inherited mind ;
A mind full of stories and patterns that the brain refuses to swallow;
 *****
This is the kind of poems that comforted to her;
Spilling words of liberation;
Spilling words of the truth behind her behavior;
A behavior that made her hate her existence;
*****
This is the kind of poems that tells her journey ;
How she is navigating to shine through life's cloud;
How she found out that she is precious too;
And how she is finally accepting her self  too; 
*****
This is the kind of poems that liberates your soul;
The kind that pushes you to draw your own map in this life;
This is the kind that works as a guideline to you ;
And the kind that pushes you out of the wooden cage that might be blinding you!
*****
This is the kind of poems that will bring warmth, comfort, peace and understanding;
This is the kind that works as a prompt to start knowing yourself better;
This is the kind of poems that will make you spread your wings and start writing your story too.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"No matter how are you feeling always stand up, dress up, show up and ever ever give up."

I'm Daisy, a writer and a podcaster!
When I was 6 years old, I used to read a lot of stories and still do, but there is something i always do to the stories i read,  is that i always change the ending to my likings lol. So from then I developed a huge interest in reading books and writing stories that never saw the light, but now I intend to let it all out.

Some of my favorite things are k-dramas, k-pop music , harry potter, reading romance novels and self development books, autumn and winter are my favorites, coffee and plants are my best friends.

I would like to express my gratitude to all of you who stopped by my profile and for your support of my work. You are really a kind soul and I really appreciate all the support you give me. Thank you!

✯✯✯✯✯✯✯✯✯✯

title: Serendipity
description:
Oh, the life of a teenage girl. It seems like high school never gets easier especially when it comes to love. Happiness was like a diamond, rare until she found someone that made her happy without even expecting it. She will learn what love really is, the challenges that come with it, and how far she will go for someone she truly cares about. 

*This is a fictional story*
*Some profanity included*

Disclaimer: This story is structured like my past and made to represent my love life but in a fictional sense. What that means not every event that happened was real. Not every character I made and their actions were real. This is purely for entertainment purposes only. Do not take this so seriously! 
Thx you!! ;)

title: My First Love
description:
A feeling, that most of us have gone through. A sweetest of joy that as caused for our hearts to break. Yet, deep down we all know, it is what that as thought us the value of everything. The value of the person you loved and the value of the person who loved them. Yes, the value of us and our love. Somewhere after this thing that as happened in our life's we all know. That now we know a much better way to love. First love is not always meant to break your heart, but to mend your heart well enough, and to give it to the person deserving. So embrace it when it comes your way.

To the past that was meant to happen. 
To the memories that always walks behind us.
I give to you this poetry of mine, to reminiscence that pure feelings.
Only to show you how beautiful it is.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: PETALS OF POETRY
description:
"PETALS OF POETRY" 

Soft as silk, delicate as dew
Petals of poetry, unfolding anew
Tender words, like rosebuds tight
Unfurl to reveal, the poet's light

In hues of hope, and shades of sorrow
Petals of poetry, dance tomorrow
Whispers of love, and echoes of pain
In delicate curves, the heart's refrain

Like cherry blossoms, fleeting and rare
Petals of poetry, fill the air
With sweet perfume, and gentle might
Illuminating life, in all its light

In poetry's garden, they bloom and thrive
Petals of beauty, for all to survive
A symphony of words, a dance of delight
Petals of poetry, shining so bright


🍂🦋🍂           🥀❤️🥀       🍂🦋🍂


A book of poems about love, nature, life etc.
Dive deep into the world of poetry and find a mystical magic in every poem.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"I can turn you into poetry, but still I can't make you love me."

Litophile (⁠｡⁠♡⁠‿⁠♡⁠｡⁠)
~ Born to be the poem but forced to be the poet
ʕ⁠っ⁠•⁠ᴥ⁠•⁠ʔ⁠っ I was born to understand and never to be understood.
~ Thalasophile with thalasophobia
~ The moonshine lover

"You were never mine, but losing you broke my heart."

"Just because I carry it well doesn't mean that it's not heavy."

"I thought I was a complete person until I saw half of me walking away."

"We were both in love, the only difference was that your love wasn't one sided."

"Do you know how does it feel to love, silently?"

"So loyal to you that I betrayed myself."


" I know in the end I'll be left behind and our tracks will change but still I promise that till my end I'll only love you."

title: From My Heart To Yours
description:
In the historic heart of Edinburgh, Evangeline Hawthorn, a dedicated medical student at the University of Edinburgh, crosses paths with the enigmatic French exchange student, Maximilian Beaumont. Evangeline, who had always prioritized academics, finds herself unexpectedly drawn to Maximilian.

 Her feelings blossom into a secret love, expressed through anonymous letters. As their clandestine meetings in the school courtyard multiply, they succumb to their undeniable chemistry. Their shared passion for knowledge and exploration leads them to embrace their love, lighting up their lives and intertwining their destinies. 

In the hallowed halls of their university, they learn that love can be as transformative as it is intoxicating. This Dark Academia-inspired romance follows Evangeline and Maximilian as they navigate the complexities of love and academia, unlocking a world of possibilities they had never imagined.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Hasil e Lahasil | حاصلِ لا حاصل
description:
(Ongoing)

Hasil e Lahasil | حاصلِ لا حاصل : (noun) 
Hasil | حاصل - Achievement 
Lahasil |  لا حاصل - Hollow Pursuits
Description: Something that is so close for you to achieve yet so far to grasp at the same time.

Laila Shah is everything but a social eminent. She is a free bird, shackled in the cage of obligations and duties, obscured by her elder sister, Sarah Shah, who unlike Laila is a social butterfly, the limelight and temptress of every heart out there.

Dilawar Malik returns to Pakistan on the wishes of his family to fulfil an obligation, a marriage with the daughter of the Shah's. 
Angry and Vexed, he is driven to unleash hell, until he meets a girl on his way to his destination. The only one who catches his eyes and captures his heart.

Will he be able to go through a marriage when his heart yearns for the other? And what about the many hearts be broken on this arduous expedition?

#1 in Obligation on 17|10|2021
#3 in Engineering on 03|03|2022
#78 out of 72.5 K in Pakistan on 30|03|2022
#1 in Shah on 06|05|2022
#18 out of 305K in poetry on 05|06|2022

title: Never-ending Poetries of Ours
description:
The timeline is different than the movie and the book. It takes place in 1990s. And as I am not cruel and Neil is my baby, I am not going to kill our Perry-Cherry



Charlie Dalton, the first member of Dead Poets Society after Neil Perry. He is charming, independent, a womanizer yet kind, sweet, confident and Loyal.

Reverie. They say her name matches her perfectly. Not because she loves to daydream, which she does but she, herself is a daydream. Beautiful, inside and out, kind yet cunning, a girl who has a way with words, who knows how to love like her father and how to fight like her mother. The girl was sunshine herself in a human form.

What will happen when two almost similar personas clash? Will they love or will they LOVE?

title: Friends Go Away.
description:
(Português/English) 

~Poetry~

Friends go away.
But
Don't you think that:

My happiness
My sadness
My pain 

Weren't a fair revenge? 

I used to love you, my friend. 
I really did.
 
~Poesia~

Amigos vão embora.
Mas
Você não acha que:

A minha felicidade 
A minha tristeza
A minha dor

Não eram uma vingança justa? 
Eu te amei, meu amigo
Eu realmente te amei.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Tenho 15 anos
O tempo passou
Mas eu não, e ao contrário do que eles querem
Continuo inventando, imaginando, criando
Histórias, músicas, poemas
Mostrando meus medos, loucuras e desejos

title: Monster.in.me (Every Feeling In Me. #1)
description:
*POETRY BOOK*

MONSTER IN ME. 
All the evil I see was Hidden in me. 

********

*PLOT*

Monster in me is not a person buried in you. But it's ourself. It's us. It's me. It's you. 

We see something. We feel something. 

And I just write that feelings in pen the emotions we share. 

*TO READERS*

Your age doesn't matters. How privilege you are at the things doesn't matters. Because we don't have a fix age to get hurt or privileges can't protect us from breaking. Every broken and hurt person will at least relate to one of this poems. 

Because the cause can be different ;  Pain are all alike. 

********


PLEASE PLEASE LEAVE COMMENTS AND VOTES. 

I REALLY WILL BE VERY THANKFUL.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Wattpad's Undiscovered (Closed For Submissions)
description:
Closed For Submissions.

Tired of searching for that completed story?  Did you know there are thousands of  undiscovered stories on Wattpad that may not show up in your search?  

I am starting this book to highlight those stories and writers.  I may not have read these but they've been submitted to me to put together for readers.  

If you are a writer please see the first part of this book for instructions.  I will have a small section for unfinished work that will only feature one story per genre.

These are not all books I've read but they've been submitted to me.

All works featured in this book belongs to the author of the book and at no time belongs to me.  I am not responsible for the content of the featured stories.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi!  I'm Grace Madden, and I'm a storyteller.  Before you read my works, please be informed that I am slowly moving my stories to Vella.

In my opinion, there are two types of authors.  Writers and storytellers.  Writers are polished, flawless, technical and professional.  A storyteller has flaws, ignores the rules and perfection isn't the main priority.  The most important thing to a storyteller is to share their emotions while exposing their flaws.  We are amateurs that are growing and trying to learn how to become a writer and have a hell of a story to share.

I want your raw emotions then I want you to laugh and share joyful moments with my characters. You may cry while you grieve with and laugh as you share joyful moments. All of my stories have mature themes although I do not like the terms smut or erotica in referencing my work.  These are love scenes, a form of art and they are meant for mature readers. I want you to feel the love they share as they discover their most intense feelings.

About me: 
I was a teen in the '90s, I'm a wife and a mother of two. A grown daughter and a teen son.  I have experienced the joys of adoption and the thrills of giving life.   I write from my rural home nestled in the middle of 43 acres of beautiful scenery.  Thank you for visiting my profile and I hope you find something here to enjoy.

I do not do critiques, read for reads or votes for votes. 

To purchase my published work on Amazon my author name is Grace E. Madden

Most of my work is now available on Kindle Vella.  Follow my author's page to view all my works. You may even find free promotions to download my ebooks on your device!
https://www.amazon.com/author/gracemadden

Follow me at Instagram! https://www.instagram.com/gracemadden1234/
Follow me on Tik Tok! https://www.tiktok.com/@gracemaddenauthor?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc

description:
𝐀 𝐩𝐡𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐛𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐠𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐞𝐧 𝐟𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐨𝐟 𝐛𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐞𝐬.

When her mind is in a total mess, 
when she feels no longer belong to herself,
or her feeling suffocates her head,
there, written an eulogy,
altered into poems and proses.

This is where those flakes 
of her personal thoughts evolved.

title: Broken beauty
description:
This collection is a journey through the darkness, a series of poems written from my heart.as someone who has seen the raw edges of life, love, and loss. Each of my poems reflects a moment, a feeling, or a memory I've held close. Some broken, some mended. It's a glimpse into my battles. The pain of giving too much, and the struggle to find peace in a world that never seemed to make sense. These poems are my way of saying everything I never could, of speaking truths I've lived but never shared. This is my story, my healing, my truth. one word at a time.

title: Harvest Festival | Astania Awards
description:
[COMPLETED]

Come one, come all to the Astania Community's Harvest Festival! We're in search of some great stories to last us through the chilly winter. No matter how big or small, all are welcome to make this harvest a bountiful one! If you'd like to throw your story into the pumpkin patch for reads and rewards, hop on the hayride to find out more!

Cover thanks to @ink3dverse!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Tempering the rising flames of writers to reach their brightest blaze.

We are a community for both writers and readers looking to improve their craft, explore new worlds, and to form friendships. All are welcome!

Here we aim to provide a safe space for people of all backgrounds to bond over literature. Share your stories for the world to see. Check out our members' stories in our reading lists to find your next obsession. Keep an eye out for contests, clubs, and other opportunities to engage with the community.

Our Discord server is also a great place to connect with other Wattpad users, along with writers on other platforms and publishing paths: https://discord.gg/authors

We no longer affiliate with other communities, but we may be open to occasional promotions for promotions. DM us to find out more!

We do NOT accept work written by AI as a representation of our community; this includes in our reading lists and contests. Please do not submit AI-assisted work to anything in our community.

Use the hashtag #AstaniaBooks or #AstaniaCommunity on your stories to show you're a part of our community!

Curious? Take a look around our profile or Carrd, and we hope you can find a home with us in the wonderful world of Astania!

Please note: If you message us on our message board without a specific question or comment regarding the community, we will likely not respond.

Account primarily run by @laurendoubleu.

title: Nyctophiliac🌙
description:
nyctophilia
(n). love of darkness or night. finding relaxation or comfort in the darkness.

"The feeling of darkness starts to creep,
warmth and serenity begins to thrive.
at night when most people are sound asleep,
it's the time when I feel most alive."

I really was different, I was a human form of night owl,
I was a ncytophiliac.
And the nyctophiliac was about to find out that she wasn't the only creature lurking at night.
Or maybe even fall in love with one.

This is a story in which a girl discovered the ugly truth behind her world.

In which a girl fought to unfold the secrets behind her past. And ought to be who she was meant to be.

title: Shattered - Dark Poems
description:
I tend to write my emotions into poems. A lot of these are dark as that's when I write the best. Please no hate as they are based on my real feelings! I only want to share them because I think people can relate and maybe they can help someone process their emotions. These are my personal works and about my personal life and feelings that I think people could relate to. This is my first book and updates aren't consistent as I only write when I'm overwhelmed with some sort of emotion -usually negative- but please still give it a chance! Constructive criticism only if you have it, as I would love to hear your thoughts and feedback on how I could do better in a positive way. If you have any requests that you want me to write about, leave a comment and i'll do my best. All images belong to their original creators, not me. I found them on google. Please vote and comment. 

© All Rights Reserved

title: Love Found in the Silence 💕
description:
This is the story of her, told in verses that ripple with quiet strength and truths hidden between the lines. In the echoes of relationships and the weight of fragile moments, she discovered that solitude is not an absence to be filled, but a sanctuary where love, clarity, and self-discovery bloom.

Her poetry is a labyrinth woven with whispers of heartbreak, resilience, and unspoken wounds that only the bold-hearted and keen-eyed will unravel. Within these pages lie coded reflections of the traumas she endured, offered not as confessions but as fragments of a puzzle meant for the strong to piece together. Every line invites the reader to pause, to wonder, to see the beauty in the silences between the words.

Through her journey, she learned that solitude is not loneliness, but love. It is the stillness where dreams are whispered and fears dissolve, where she found the courage to face herself and rewrite the meaning of being whole. This book is not only her story but an invitation to see solitude not as isolation but as the essence of life, the quiet revolution where the soul finds its home.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Survivor
description:

The feeling of not having control over things in life is what builds these poems, the aspiration to live freely without the constraints of society.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Sad girl writing 🎀💀

title: Inner Awakening: "Illuminate the darkness and soothe the whispering within"
description:
In the quiet corners of their soul, a poet was born-an observer of the world's shadows and its soft whispers of light. Through the pages of time, they journeyed, tracing the lines of their own existence. With a heart that feels deeply and a spirit that seeks truth, they wrote of love lost and found, of betrayal and forgiveness, of loneliness that lingers, and of hope that refuses to die. Each poem is a reflection, a piece of a puzzle seeking to illuminate the darkness within.

Their words weave a narrative of inner awakening, a battle between sorrow and serenity, trust and its fractures. They've witnessed the turmoil of injustice and felt the ache of false judgment, yet through it all, a quiet resilience remains. From the love of their homeland to the gentle company of a pet, they draw comfort from life's simple joys, grounding themselves in what feels true and eternal.

Like a summer storm and the soft drizzle of spring rain, their emotions flow, unpredictable yet constant, carrying the reader through the seasons of the heart. And amidst the chaos, their faith guides them-a faith in life, in love, in humanity, and in the strength to rebuild, even when broken down. Each poem is not just an expression, but a balm, a way to soothe the whispering within and find peace with what remains.

title: Poetry of a Mockingbird (An LGBTQ+ Poetry Collection)
description:
Watty's 2019 Poetry Winner

An LGBTQ+ Poetry Collection, about the good, the bad, and the sad of coming out, dating, and existing as a proud member of the LGBTQ+ community. 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
I started so small
With nothing to say for me at all
Just a bird in a world of birds
Just a being who has not much to show for themselves

I worked hard though
Even when everyone else cast me out
Threw me out 
I stayed strong

I battled the forces of nature 
As they came my way 
I kept going
And learned to fly

I flew above everyone else
And saw what I had become
With my wings outstretched 
I saw who I am;

A mockingbird 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

~Dedicated to Keefe, who supported me when I found myself lost in the midst of my identity~
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
This author tends to write about the darker things in life to spread awareness about these issues. He loves to connect with other authors and fall into the beauty of the writing community. Feel free to reach out, and he'll try his best to get back to you as soon as possible!

title: 𝑲𝒂𝒍𝒐𝒑𝒔𝒊𝒂.
description:
Kalopsia
[ka-lop-se-a] Greek
(n.) The delusion of things being more beautiful than they really are.

Poetry. Mostly intertwined with Tales of Greek Mythology.


"Will wonders never cease
When my muse saunters the velvet night,
And prays to the moon for fine dreams,
With the voice of a thousand angels singing a symphony?"

"You obliterated her heart
Ruined her morality
Invaded her thoughts without permission
And filled her senses with poison."

"A single flower, the Hyacinth
To be here for all time,
Til the earth goes for the long rest,
And til we all are dying,
And on its softest petals, I inscribe my sorrows "alas"
For all time."


#1 in free verse as of 1/21/21
#4 in poetry as of 3/24/22

#1 in dark academia as of 10/5/20
#1 in romanticism as of 11/18/20
#1 in light academia as of 1/16/21
#12 in poet as of 1/20/21

A bit about me...

I like reading and writing, and being from the UK, I write in British English rather than American English. I'm bisexual and genderfluid, so my books tend to have a heavy LGBTQ+ slant to them.  As a fully-fledged adult, some of my books may have mature content and may contain explicit language.

Just to be clear, I do not condone illegal activities, including non-consensual or underage sex, and I hope that comes across in my writing.  Any main characters engaged in sexual activity would legally be classed as adults in the UK. 

I've been trying out different styles of writing, and although I feel most comfortable writing mxm sci-fi / fantasy stories, I also write poetry.  Do feel free to peek at my works - if one doesn't appeal to you, another might!

Connect with me on X:   https://x.com/Evan_Binley
Find me on Goodreads:  https://www.goodreads.com/Evan_Binley
For anyone interested in my Beat Saber skills:  https://www.youtube.com/@evanbinley

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Just a teenager trying to make sense of the chaotic thoughts in my head. I have a whole cast of characters begging for their stories to be told. I write about broken characters, because sometimes it's easier to see them struggle than to deal with my own feelings.

A pro at procrastinating, I write when I should be doing literally anything else. So if you're reading one of my books, don't ask me when the next chapter's coming. I'm probably still avoiding it.

title: Latidos de Contradicciones
description:
¡Bienvenidos a mi mundo de recuerdos! En esta, mi primera publicación, les invito a un viaje íntimo a través de mis memorias. Descubran los rincones más profundos de mis experiencias mientras navegan por los senderos de mis recuerdos. Su apoyo y comentarios son siempre bienvenidos. ¡Acompáñenme en este viaje de nostalgia y descubrimiento!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
En las páginas que siguen, encontrarás un viaje a través de emociones plasmadas en palabras, un reflejo íntimo de mi mundo interior. Cada palabra, cada verso, es una ventana a las profundidades de experiencias, anhelos y reflexiones que han marcado mi camino.

Estas letras surgen de momentos de introspección, de noches de silencio abrazadas por las estrellas y días teñidos por la paleta del amor, la pérdida y la búsqueda de significado. Son el eco de susurros del pasado y el latir de un presente repleto de preguntas, esperanzas y anhelos.

A través de estas líneas, invito al lector a sumergirse en un océano de sentimientos. Desde la euforia de los momentos felices hasta la profunda melancolía que a veces embarga el alma, estas palabras buscan comunicar aquello que a menudo queda enredado en los recovecos del corazón.

Este libro no solo es una colección de escritos, sino un intento de explorar la complejidad humana, la belleza de la vulnerabilidad y la fuerza que surge de reconocer nuestras propias cicatrices. En cada página, encontrarás mi voz, mis susurros y mis gritos silenciados.

Espero que estas palabras resuenen contigo, que encuentres reflejos de tu propio viaje en ellas y que, al sumergirte en este universo de letras, encuentres compañía, consuelo o tal vez un eco de tus propias experiencias.

Bienvenido a este viaje entre letras y emociones

title: "From Fiction to Ambition: A Journey Unveiled."🖋️✨
description:
Aisha as a young girl with a vivid imagination and a deep love for books. From a young age, she was drawn to the magical worlds and captivating stories within the pages of novels . These books became her companions, offering comfort and inspiration during challenging times.

As Aisha grew older, her passion for reading only intensified. She would spend hours lost in the pages of these novels, immersing herself in the lives of the characters and their extraordinary journeys. Each book left a lasting impression on her, shaping her thoughts, beliefs, and aspirations.

Now, as we delve into the present, we find Aisha at a crossroads in her life. She has
 just completed her education and is embarking on a new chapter. However, she feels a sense of emptiness and uncertainty, longing for something more meaningful. Little does she know that her deep connection to these books will soon lead her on an extraordinary adventure of her own.

So, let's take this journey with Aisha, exploring her past, her present, and the exciting future that awaits her. Together, we'll uncover the power of imagination, the strength of self-discovery, and the magic that lies within the pages of these beloved books. 📖✨
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Poems from the Quill, by Olan L. Smith
description:
"Poems from the Quill" is where I place current works that don't fall into other collections. It is here you will find obscure poems that range from constraint to free-verse. I began this collection as a contest entry, years ago, for what was then the poetry side of the Watty's contest and I have since kept it current with odds and ends. Love, peace, and freedom. 

Olan L. Smith aka Cotton Jones
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Olan L. Smith was born in Huntsville, Missouri in 1953. He graduated from Westran High School in 1971 and went on to receive two degrees in higher education.  He graduated in 1978 from Northwest Christian College in Eugene Oregon with a B.S. degree, and a Master's degree from Northwest Missouri State University in Maryville, Missouri.  Olan first published poetry in 1985 in two literary publications; Earthwise, University of Miami, Florida, and Alura Poetry, Vol. X, No 2 Fall, 1985; Minnesota.  Other published poems from Olan L. Smith (Cotton Jones) can be found in Poetry Train America, by John E. Wordslinger (edited by Charles H. Gragg), 2013; The Universe Inside; Editor Eva Xanithopoulos, 2012.

title: Violet Evergarden x Fem Reader
description:
You are new to the Auto-Memories Doll's business. Your Father incessantly demeaned you, pestering you to get a job and move out. You finally did. After graduating the grueling academy, you brought yourself to the CH postal company where you quickly befrended Claudia Hodgins, the boss and owner of the establishment, Benedict Blue, and his seeming nemesis, Cattleya Baudelaire.

Often, you caught yourself watching the beautifully enchanting woman, who you never got the chance to talk to; whenever you had your break, she was never in the break room. You wished that it would change, that you would eventually talk and purposefully stare into those ocean blue diamonds. You wished and wished and wished. Then you were dragged into the abyss of slumber, overwhelmed by fatigue.

title: a symphony of stars, a cacophony of wishes.
description:
❝𝘵𝘰 𝘧𝘪𝘯𝘥 𝘮𝘺 𝘭𝘰𝘷𝘦
𝘪𝘯 𝘢 𝘭𝘪𝘧𝘦 𝘰𝘧 𝘳𝘦𝘨𝘳𝘦𝘵𝘴

𝘮𝘢𝘺𝘣𝘦 𝘐 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘨𝘰𝘵𝘵𝘦𝘯
𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘮𝘦𝘮𝘰𝘳𝘪𝘦𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘩𝘶𝘳𝘵
𝘴𝘰 𝘐 𝘤𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘳𝘵
𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘰𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘢𝘨𝘢𝘪𝘯❞

˜"*°•˜"*°•˜"*°•

a broken soul yearning to be whole again. a dream fighting the currents to avoid being shattered. a mask laughing to hide the cracks underneath. a heart being remade and crushed too many times. ties snapped clean. friends whose faces are no longer remembered. family whose deeds blurred the meaning of the word. 

life is nothing but a journey but is it always meant to be traveled?

˜"*°•˜"*°•˜"*°•

a symphony of stars, a cacophony of wishes is the first half of the one-poem-a-day (OPAD) challenge for the year 2021. the second half is a collection titled an adjournment of scars, an endearment of stitches.

© sofiya v. 2021

- all other graphics are made by me

title: Sunset  & Sunrise Over Gaza
description:
The sunset in Gaza bleeds across the horizon, a sky torn between fire and ash, its colors too vivid to bear witness without pain. It drips scarlet and gold, as though the heavens themselves weep for the ground below, where life is snuffed out as swiftly as the fading light.

The sun descends like a broken promise, heavy with the weight of innocence lost. Each ray stretches across the land like a trembling hand reaching for something already gone-peace, safety, humanity. But the earth answers only with silence, its voice buried beneath rubble and grief.

The sea, a witness to countless sunsets, mirrors the sky's anguish. Waves lap against the shore, whispering secrets of despair carried from the cries of those unseen, unheard. The horizon becomes a line blurred, a boundary that no longer separates light from dark, just as the boundaries of justice and cruelty dissolve into indifference.

In Gaza, the sunset does not herald the calm of evening; it is a curtain drawn over a stage of unending suffering. The colors of twilight do not soothe but burn, mirroring the fires that consume homes, dreams, and futures. It is not a transition from day to night but a descent into deeper shadows, where even stars seem too ashamed to shine.

Here, the setting sun feels like a slow, deliberate extinguishing of hope, each second dragging on like the unbearable weight of a siege. The horizon, once a promise of tomorrow, becomes a reminder of the world's complicity in a today drenched in blood.

In Gaza, the sunset is not a metaphor for endings but for the persistence of human resilience against a backdrop of unspeakable loss. It whispers of a people who, even in the face of genocide, refuse to let their light vanish without a trace, their spirit etched into the sky for all who dare to look.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: zoned out
description:
"what is that you're doing on your phone?" my mother asked 
me, as she kept her eyes steady on the road ahead of us.

"writing what no one will listen to." i responded quietly, as i 
finished typing up the last letter of the word of my last thought.

she hummed, threatening to no appeal.

──────────୨ৎ──────────

they're poems i'm pretty sure.

description:
Just words that flow 
A river in my head
It twists and turns 
And never stays the same
The current is strong
You can never go back
Pen it down 
And remember 
The joy of the ride 
Through the rough bumpy tide
That are the words 
In my mind.

authorBio:
⚕️💞


I can never read all the books I want; I can never be all the people I want and live all the lives I want. I can never train myself in all the skills I want. And why do I want? I want to live and feel all the shades, tones and variations of mental and physical experience possible in my life. And I am horribly limited.
-Sylvia Plath💝

title: DWSIL - Days When Silence Is Loud
description:
Have you ever thought about how hard it is to suffer alone and in silence? Why don't we confide in anyone? 

It's just not possible. No one listens, no one asks, and no one responds. So what's the point? 

I'd rather suffer alone and in silence with a good book in my hand. Even the paper will hear me out better than you, thank you. 


- Writer N.


(All poems are mine)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
🌷 Hi buddies! 🌷

There's a little about me; I'm just a normal teenage girl who really loves to read and write. I enjoy romance 💕- the dark one, hehe, fantasy 🧝♀️, thriller 😱 and I also don't mind some horror 🔪.  I also really love reading and watching psychological things. 🌀

I love listening to songs, playing the guitar AND mentioned writing and reading. :)

If you wonder, I come from Slovak Republic. 🇸🇰

Why don't you also check my stories? 👀

With you (Larry Stylinson) - completed, fanfiction, VERY short story, slovak language

Boyfriends - completed, fanfiction, romantic story, slovak language

DWSIL - new completed book, poetry about mental health etc., english language

Broken Paths, Mended Hearts - new/following story, will be in english language

I mostly plan on to write my stories in english from now on! 🇬🇧🇺🇸

I'm here if you have any questions or want a person to talk to - I always respond! 🫶🏻

You can also find me on Instagram - nikola_1d


- Sincerely, Writer 🌷.

title: Past midnight.
description:
You're human and humans crave human connection.
But it doesn't mean you'll ever get it.
You see?
You believed.
Even if it was for a second.
A single stupid second.
 
       - S.M

I'm lost in my words. I write all my thoughts, stupid feelings and far away dreams. Hope you can find the answers I couldn't.

title: Everstream Loom
description:
Everstream Loom is a never-ending poetry collection, written in a style that keeps changing as I grow. The poems explore philosophical and existential ideas, moving through personal emotions, societal questions, and universal themes. It's like a flowing journey of thoughts, capturing moments, questions, and reflections as they evolve. This collection will keep going, growing with time, and showing how my writing and thinking develop along the way.

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi there! I'm Bhavna Ojha, and I love telling stories that bring together different languages and cultures. On my Wattpad, you'll find novels like "One Love Story Also Like This" and "Soul Never Dies," as well as poetry collections like "Ink and Rhymes: A Teenage Poet's Diary," "Tales of Hopeless Romantics: Imperfect Poetic Journey of Love and Life," and "Mad People's Dorm."

I mix Hindi, English, and Nepali in my writing to create stories that touch hearts everywhere. Whether you're looking for heartwarming tales or thought-provoking poetry, you'll find something to enjoy here. Come join me on a journey through emotions and imagination. Let's explore these stories together!

title: GENUINE READ FOR READS
description:
What do I mean by "genuine"? I mean I want to do what Wattpad was made for. I want to engage in what you have written, not merely vote for the sake of popularity. I do want to read, comment, and vote on your work, and I want the same in return for my stories as well, but in a way that is in the spirit of writing. The goal of this thing is to actually discover great stories written by imaginative people and to actually enjoy each other's talent. Leave your book title here! I want to read it! All I ask is that you give my books a chance in return!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey, Any criticism you can offer me would be appreciated, don't be afraid to pick my works a part. I am an English Major pursuing my Masters. For as long as I can remember, I loved to draw and write, and began my first substantial written work when I was sixteen. Perhaps one day I'll see something of mine published, but for now, I would love for anyone to help me out by telling me what is rubbish about what I write. There is always room for improvement.

Otherwise, I am obsessed with cats, chocolate, and Kraft Dinner as well as the band Bring Me The Horizon, which inspires a lot of my stories through their music. Other bands I like are Disturbed, Breaking Benjamin, RED, Nirvana and Metallica.  As you can tell by my name, I am a bit of an introvert, but I would like to turn this around, which is half the reason I am putting a work out there to be criticized.

I hope you enjoy my stories!

title: Searching For Nirvana
description:
The sequel to "Bull in a China Cabinet". 
I wrote BIACC from ages 17 to 21 and
I've been going through a complete metamorphosis the past 2 years so I decided it's time to start a new chapter. I hope you enjoy following me on this journey too. These books will be published someday. 



PSA:
I found this cover on Pinterest & edited the background & everything. When I publish these books & can find an illustrator that can make my vision come to life, I will create my own original cover because I am not an artist. Most pictures in these books were found on Pinterest.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My name is Amiyah McKenzie but I go by Amiyah Ny'cole in my work. I am a 24 year old wheelchair bound writer from rural Arkansas with type 3 Osteogenesis Imperfecta, better known as Brittle Bone Disease.
Writing, poetry, and music has always been my escape from my dense reality. It's my safe haven. My happy place.
Writing is a huge passion of mine and I'm so proud of my work. I pour my soul into my writings so I really hope that you enjoy them as much as I do!

Thank you for reading! ❤️

title: A Poets Legacy [WIP]
description:
America, USA, US, The U.S of A, Home of the Brave, Land of the Free, Land of Opportunity, whatever you call him, he might as well be one of the best world superpowers to ever exist. Sure, he's popular, powerful, and persuasive. But there's always a hidden layer, always hidden secrets, stories, and sorrows.

The Russian Federation, or simply Russia, mostly hates America. Russia hates the way so many people praise America and how so many look down upon himself. What did Russia ever do to them? True... he has... flaws... but that's nothing compared to what America's done.

===================================================================

After a meeting, America leaves a notebook under his seat, but not a normal notebook. It's a notebook that was given to America by KOF after he gained independence from the British Empire. He hadn't used it much until The Great Depression. At first it was a few doodles here, a few entries there. But now... now it's almost filled completely. Filled with poetry he heard and liked, or things he wrote himself.
But Russia found the notebook. Recalling stories his father told him and according to his memory, America's always had that notebook. Russia decides against taking a peek, even though he wanted to know what was inside of it. 

Except, UN put Russia in charge of looking after America, after noticing something off about America. Now America has to introduce Russia to many, many new faces, and Russia has to deal with America and his secrecy.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Skeletal Poet's Sonnents
description:
Invisible Lockets 

July 5th, 
Under the pine tree, 
Filling my lungs with butterflies
Of your smile 
And sandal whispers of the ground. 

I must be the foolish one, 
Seeking for love
When the cupid's arrow 
Struck striaght in my heart. 

So in love 
I made us invisible lockets 
My initial carved on yours, 
And yours on mine, 
As if my heart isnt. 

Just between us, 
I remember it. 
I dont know if you 
Ever felt how foolish I must be, 
Or did you make a mockery 
Of my love with your friends? 
Did you come to my learning haven, 
Only to find me sulking
It was rare, 
Do you remember it? 

Maybe 
The lockets I made for us, 
Were never meant to be, 
Swinging a swing 
In a children's playground, 
Thinking your initial is carved on mine.
Tous Droits Réservés
