title: Poems
description:
"love is a game of tic-tac-toe constantly waiting for the next x and o"


This book consists of poems about life, love & pain. We all experience different things in our lives. We all met different people that changed our lives. We are all different. But somehow, we can relate to each other - because of what we've experienced and maybe the way we felt about it. 

We are society.
We make society.
We are the ones who give the meaning of society.


•


NOTE: This is a collection of poems made by the author. Some poems are NOT based on her experiences but based on STORIES that she has read.

title: Amor Fati
description:
Love was inevitable when fate herself wrote a beautiful story weaved with love, compassion and a bit of French Literature.

An ideology set and believed by Wei Ying for his beloved Lan Zhan, a story that encompasses their lives as mere teenagers to adulthood, matrimony and beyond. 

Join me in this beautiful tale where a man passionately shares his journey and finally embraces the arms of a man just born for him.

title: Well that wasn't supposed to happen
description:
Modukpe Dream Ireti was one of the most annoying girls Rotimi had ever met. He had always hated her,  ever since they were in third grade. But of course, hatred couldn't stop Rotimi from becoming her prince charming when he figures out she's about to commit suicide.
Never did he expect to find a letter to Modukpe's mom saying that she was tired of not being loved. And never did he expect that he'd be the one to have to change her mind.
How can he convince the girl he's hated all his life that he loves her just as much as she needs him to?
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
I'm Rowena, a 21-year-old BS Social Work student. I started writing here on the 11th of June, 2022.

E-mail address: rowenalasuta7@gmail.com

If you have something important to say, reach me through my e-mail address.

My stories contain grammatical and typographical errors. You can correct me anytime. I'm still learning and improving.

I write stories that could lead to life guidance like Christian devotionals, and motivational stories. I also like to create romance stories with moral lesson's and inspiring words in it.

Writing  stories was I thought not a part of my life hobbies. I had my Wattpad installed-uninstalled-installed for 2 years in my phone but I haven't had the chance to open and read stories for how many months.

But over decade's God showed me something. He showed me what I can do in Wattpad. I thought myself that goal for having a Wattpad is to read only but I was wrong, His goal for me is to make me become a better writer. I just realized that God gave me a passion to write; indeed it's my passion! 

I remember when I was 16 years old, I write a romance story that I shockingly finished it. For some reason I didn't know that this was actually my passion it's because of many interests and other passions -- passion to compose songs and play guitar. But anyway, that's all I can tell how I started to write stories here in Wattpad and why I write. 

Here's the list of my stories:

Christian Stories
1. Thirty Letters for Valerie ( On-going )

Always remember, be excited when you read. It'll give you an inspiration to read any stories.

Happy reading!

Some covers are mine but some were not. Photos that are attached within chapters are not mine. Credits goes to the rightful owners.

title: Dark Attraction
description:
A collection of deliciously, dark poems.

#3 in Poetry - 9/6/18

I hope you enjoy and any time taken to read, is greatly appreciated and if you wanted to hit the little vote button or comment, you will have my eternal gratitude.
H x

The main theme of this book is the macabre and horror.  Some of the poems are inspired by horror movies that carry an age 15 rating. 

There are also some poems touching upon anxiety issues.  If you feel you would be upset by reading anything of this nature, then I would advise that this collection may not be for you.  Although, for others, it may be of interest, to see another persons experience of this.  I will leave the choice up to you.

Whilst there is nothing particularly graphic in here, there are scary themes and also some darker themes.   There are also some scary images along with the horror themed poems.  

All images featured were found via Bing Search, online.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hazel is a poet and writer based in the Highlands of Scotland. Her writing explores memory, relationships, the importance of compassion, for others and ourselves. Her work also explores struggles with mental health and body-image; subjects she believes need to be discussed in an open and honest way.

Hazel is also a mature student in her final year studying BA (Hons) Creative Writing with the University of the Highlands & Islands. Whilst poetry is her first love, she also enjoys writing short fiction and has been published in Northwords Now and Scottish Book Trust's 2019 Anthology, The Blether. Her poetry has also been published online with Poetry in Public, 192 Magazine and Bandit Fiction.

Hazel is mother to two children, two dogs and one 3-legged cat, and wife to husband, Darren. She is a feminist who believes in equal rights and that trans rights are human rights. She is proud to be an ally to the LGBTQIA community, who need our support now, more than ever. Love is love, hate is corrosive.

title: Give Light to Dark Thoughts
description:
When the heart bleeds and nothing can heal it, the only thing left to do is write. Thoughts are volatile, sometimes they are cruel and other times are kind, nevertheless both are needed. If the pain didn't exist no one would know what happiness feels like. This book of poems is the moments when just for a second dark is all that it is, so why not share and give it light, hopefully someone will feel identify with at least one poem.

Not all the poem will be in a negative connotation, and the images I put will be from Pinterest.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I found peace within words and they have become my passion. I'm still learning and have a long way to go. Hopefully, the things I write can have an impact on someone or at least entertain for a moment. Thank you for reading...

authorBio:
"Everything you can imagine is real." - Pablo Picasso

Unleashing a fresh perspective on one of my stories: A Realm Of Earth And Healing 🌱

---

Hi there! I'm a writer, or at least I try to be. I craft stories in both Filipino and English, but I'm currently diving deeper into the English language.

I find solace in the world of words. Reading and writing have always been my escape, my quiet sanctuary. Reading makes me feel connected, like I belong to a vast community of minds. Writing, on the other hand, is my catharsis, my way of processing emotions and sharing my experiences.

Remember, words have the power to heal and inspire. You can save someone with the right words at the right time! So keep writing, let your imagination run wild, and see where your words take you! 🖊️✨

title: Poems of a teenager
description:
Poems about daily struggles and overwhelming moments (anxiety, overthinking, trust issues etc.)


One of my favorites:

We go through the motions
Every morning visualizing the moment we will finally be in bed again 
You wake up, slowly getting through the day
As the hours go by the anxiety and stress and expectations pile onto you
Our parents scolding us that we're lazy 
They don't know we hate ourselves for it 
They don't know we spend endless hours staring at our phone with jealousy and defeat 
We watch people's best lives as we're going through our worst moments 
The world is burning and the hate is easier to give than ever 
So no... being a teenager isn't easy 
Images assault us, screaming we're not good enough 
Because the person we're watching is 17 and a millionaire 
While we practice out smile in the mirror making sure it looks sincere



Instagram account: @my.poetry.reads

title: MIDNIGHT MIND
description:
writing words that the heart utters 
The thoughts the minds ponders 
The verses the mouth is too ashamed to mutter
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A girl lost in a cruel world

Hiding her tears behind words

Having a book as a companion

Acting as if she is the lion

Waiting for the time when the
empty feeling in her heart will fade

A time that she think it can't be made.

*The worst kind of loneliness is the one that holds onto your heart


The one that proves you that you aren't the best

The one that tortures you mentally and leaves nothing but a painful hurt.

*Sometimes all you have to do is believe

For this world is a place to heave

And try your best to never grieve

title: Les Noyades
description:
Rumi lives amidst the cluttered pile of his eclectic father's academic papers, the half-forgotten son of an exhausted Cambridge professor. 

There is nothing of interest in the town- nothing, that is, until their door is opened to one of his father's undergraduates. Across the span of an impromptu road-trip to track down a missing thesis, Rumi discovers that this student of his father's provides a great deal more than interest to his life.

This work contains plentiful mature content. take this as a warning or a selling point.

title: Spoken Poetry
description:
"Every poetry has a story."

1 shot story of every poetry.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, mga madz! I know my intro sounds so jiji but don't care. Super attitude ko ba diyan? Sorry na.

Anyways, I start writing here on March 09, 2021.

"Runaway Bride" is the first story that  I published here, it is still on-going and I hope that y'all will like it.

"His Pride" my second story. It is also still on-going,  and I planned to continue writing it after I complete my Runaway Bride story.

"Spoken Poetry" this is the third. I carefully write this to instantly give you all a personal advice. To those people out there who can't share their real feelings but naturally want an advice you can always read it.

I also have a plan to write a series story. And that is the MAHAYAHAY SERIES. I hope you'll gonna support me.

Btw, I believe that.........

title: rambling poetry
description:
Ich habe zum ersten Mal versucht, Gedichte zu schreiben, und kam dann bald in einen Fluss, in dem ich einzelne Zeilen schrieb, die ich für sich alleine schön fand, und die im ganzen mehr einen verschwommenen Gefühlszustand beschreiben als ein konkretes Ereignis. Vielleicht findet jemand daran Gefallen.
Domaine public
authorBio:
Ein unübersehbarer Großteil aller Leute, die das hier lesen, werden vermutlich durch die Idylle hierher gefunden haben. Vielleicht mag es so scheinen, als nütze ich das Thema aus, jedoch muss der Leser verstehen, dass mir das Schreiben dieser Geschichte unglaublich Spaß macht, und ich die Geschichte auch nur fortsetze, wenn ich Spaß daran finde😊
Nun, ich hoffe, euch gefällt dieser Account. Vielleicht kommt auch mal was anderes... Who knows 🤷♀️
Live long and prosper!

title: A Perspective
description:
This is a compilation of my personal written poetry.

No matter how emotionless you seem to everyone, eyes tend to tell them how you really feel. What was it that you saw, that it made you who you are today? Would you believe me that it's your point of view that is shaping you or would you believe yourself? 

If you see the negativity of what you saw, would you change your perspective or just choose to get stuck on it? 

A friendly reminder. Accept what you saw, have a tea on it, embrace it like how you comfort a friend and let it leave like a visitor in your house.

Have a great reading!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Meadow Rose
description:
Gardens of Plenty, 
stories unfold, 
It's a telling for many, 
from centuries ago...

I've gathered some work 
from moments 
I've been emboldened to clarity...
befuddlement,
in many ways, 
it paints my prose. 
It continues to keep me on my toes.

When it first arose,
It's hard to say
If there were a day
where it were not.

Journals I continually keep
And out they seem to seep.
Please enjoy my collection,
I know I have.

The solace they bring,
I'll continually cherish
with the aging of my cheek,
or so to speak.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
About her self
there is a queue
of self embellishments
strayed askew.

Its quite a handful
For all but a few
and I am proud
to be surrounded by you.

From all the love
the warmth and support,
I've sprouted
an inspiration of sorts.

The founts of life
I've found within
were keenly relented
in angels,
long frequented.

xoxo periwinkle

title: Mind of heart
description:
SNEAK PEEK
"Yes, he was always behind me...
Thought with a knife in his hands, which was buried six inches in my back."

"The clock tickles, time folds,
A story of love once bright, now old."

"Love that once lived, but now is dead,
Just like the rose that wilted."

"Echoes of laughter turned into cries...
Both lovers stood there asking why."

"He was a part of me but now is apart from me."

Just trying to pen down my feelings. Most of the time, we cannot express our feelings because feelings are in the depths of our hearts, and the heart is not good with words... but our mind is, right? If the heart had a mind, it would have been able to express our feelings. That is why the name of my book is "Mind Of Heart."
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Why?
description:
Why is the question that ponders the poet's mind, plaguing the stories they write. 

Why are we alive?

Why are we dead?

Why do we dream?

Why do we see?

This poet ventures the various theories that poison the question of why. 

The question why comes from the source of the world being full of color, pain, joy, life, and death. 

The poet finds humanity confusing and intriguing to comprehend.

Despite everything written in this book, the poet continues to write.

P.s. some of the views are not real people or are just myself editing.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: My name is Alisha P., and I'm 19 years old. Most things I write come from my imagination, dreams/nightmares, what I think, and experiences. I'm still learning when it comes to writing, but I love it. I'm is also interested in knitting, photography, and blogging. I love books and adventures. I want to be a photographer, blogger, content creator, and writer.

"Tum niche uthar rhi ho ya mai naraz hojaon ga" 
"Mai mana lun gi"
"Mai tab bhi nhi mana tou"
"Tou mai naraz hojaon gi"

title: solace. ; poetry
description:
calmness and chaos go synonymously.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Selene
[previously Mia]

Amalgamation of obsidian dark mist and diaphanous daylight

Personal rant space

Low tolerance for bs

"She will rise. With a spine of steel and a roar like thunder, she will rise."

"My mama said marry a rich man and I was like mama I am the rich man."  - Cher

"One of the greatest regrets in life is being what others would want you to be, rather than being yourself."

"You don't drown by falling in the water, you drown by staying there."

"When people don't express themselves, they die one piece at a time."

"We all were born so beautiful the greatest tragedy is not being convinced we are."

This time,
I won't say "why me"
But this time,
I will say, "let them try me"

"I cannot make you understand. I cannot make anyone understand what is happening inside me. I cannot even explain it to myself."

"I think perhaps all of us go a little crazy at times."

Gotta go insane to stay sane

Future's gonna be okay...

90% of your worries are a figment of your own imagination

"You've shown me I have reasons
I should love myself"

"I'm the one I should love in this world
Shining me, precious soul of mine
I finally realized so I love me
Not so perfect but so beautiful"
- Epiphany

authorBio:
Hello / Namaste !
I'm Swetha and yes I'm an Indian and a big fan of INDIAN CRIME SHOW CID, especially Kavin and Purvi (Karvi/kavi/Kevi).

I'm an introvert but I do a lot of chatting and I would love to interact with my readers.

I don't follow anybody back until I really want to. I don't read much (used to read CID fanfics) because being a writer myself I expect  my fellow writers to express better and the main reason I'm not into reading these days is because BEING A CID FAN FOR 13 YEARS I KNOW THE WAY THE CHARACTER EXPRESSES THEMSELVES. But nowadays, I feel the character expressing in different ways and I lose interest easily. So if you want me to read your works, make sure that its a Kavi work & also put a bit of effort or else I'll  lose interest.


I WRITE ONLY ON KAVI and not any other couple. 
My stories are described in English, but the dialogues will be in Hindi. You guys can visit my library to see my completed works.

If you are a beginner on wattpad and you need help, just PM me and I'll definitely help you and if you want tips for writing, I can give that too.

The most important thing is I chose the celeb according to character, so pls don't start bashing.
Do vote, comment if you like my works.Follow me to get notifications.


Thanks for your support and love !



https://instagram.com/kfsrwattyxkavi?igshid=ZDc4ODBmNjlmNQ== https://instagram.com/kfsr_cid_fanpage?igshid=OGQ5ZDc2ODk2ZA==

description:
Ever needed a different way - sort of - to see the world? Life's already so tough and sometimes, to see reality, we need to get away from reality. That's why in this new project of ours, WNI brings to you an anthology of short stories and poems.

These pieces, written and crafted by a group of two writers to one piece, are based off various themes including, but not limited to; self-love and acceptance, societal vices, family, friendship and so on. 

The themes mentioned are, without doubt, very important in this generation. As they are things we face, both young and old. That's why we hope we would do a very good job of making you see them, from a perspective that's just not yours alone.
 
So, get yourself prepared, it's going to be one hell of a ride.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Child of Light: The Fairy Tale
description:
Child, tuck yourself in bed,
Let me tell a story,
Of Lemuria, a kingdom past,
And a girl born for glory.

Lost from our world came she,
Treachery gave close chase,
She raised her sword and flew,
For she feared not the race.

Three long lost lights to save,
A mad queen to defeat,
The journey would transform her,
Her destiny to meet.

The path home tragic and faint.
Beware the night, Child of Light.
********************************
For such an epic fairy tale, i was saddened that it was only in a video game form. What about the book readers? what about the children who could not afford the game itself? 

Therefore I decided to be a narrator, to write one, a fan fiction (retaining the rhyming style in my writing) for all those who did not know about such a story; children, adults, and all who still have the child's heart within (him/her)self. 

I'm really thankful to Jeffrey Yohalem & Ubisoft Team for creating such a beautiful fairy tale. 

*This Fan Fiction work is only a narration of the original game*
"Child of Light™ story, art, music and original characters | © 2014 Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved."
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Ah, the thrill of adventure and the allure of the unknown have always been my guiding stars. I find myself irresistibly drawn to hiking through mystical forests and exploring the hidden corners of new cities, each journey a new chapter in my ever-unfolding story.

History and fairy tales have always been my companions, their pages filled with magic and wonder. I lose myself in the fiction of the 1800s, where the brilliant Sherlock Holmes and the ingenious Agatha Christie weave their intricate tales. My love for the humanities has led me to delve deep into psychology and cognitive science, seeking to unravel the mysteries of the human mind.

My hands are never idle, always creating-whether sketching, or playing the piano and violin, each note and stroke a testament to my boundless creativity.

In this world brimming with endless possibilities, I live a life rich with discovery, connection, and the timeless magic of stories

title: The Ache of Blooming
description:
"Harrowing memories haunting me, 
Their thorns won't let me free. 
I cannot see that I will be an escapee. 
Though for each harsh drop of pain, 
My twisting vines are forced to gain, 
intricate blossoms with chance to bloom."

"The Ache of Blooming" is a poetry collection that touches upon various topics, both dark and enlightening throughout a journey of healing and self-discovery. Jumping around misery, hope and healing to show healing is nor linear or easy. May these words evoke raw and real emotions from deep within.

title: What Could've Been
description:
Realistically, most relationships from young love end up going the wrong way. It is worse when both of you are separated strictly and in distance. Nobody else makes you feel the way this person does, so you try your hardest. Even through the worst moments, you have to ask yourself if it is even worth it? We all want teen romance and fun, short, dumb relationships. However, when I tell you how it could've been for me, you'll understand true teen romance.

title: Every Rose Has Its Thorn
description:
Midoriya has fallen for a very special person, an angry pomeranian to be exact. Ok, his name is actually Bakugo, but Izuku's one-sided love blossoms into something worse. Hanahaki. Isn't love just wonderful? But every rose has its thorn. Every emotion Midoriya has for Bakugo turns back to pain. Midoriya's time is running out, but he still yearns for someone to love. His depression and suicidal thoughts only make things worse.

Meanwhile...
Bakugo knows that something is up with Midoriya and that he is not as happy as he seems. He doesn't suspect a thing about Midoriya's hanahaki though. He thought he hated Midoriya's guts before but realizes he has only been trying to push him away because he loves him. He now decides to be nicer, but still pushes his non-platonic feelings away, not knowing that it's the one thing Midoriya needs.

Now.
Midoriya's depression and anxiety grows worse, and hanahaki is slowly overtaking him. He just wants to be normal, he just wants to be happy, he just wants to be loved. Will Midoriya find a solution to his problems or will death take its toll?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Pool Party
description:
When Emma Harte, a pretty, late blooming, slightly nerdy teen girl who has never shared her first kiss, decides to help her not-brother James, the ultimate womanizer, and the most popular boy in school, with his huge 'party of the year' scheme, she finds herself trying to keep their relationship in tact. James' dad got married to Emma's mon when they were really young, and they all have lived under the same roof since. But, a couple years after James' dad passed away, James was sent off to another school, St. Bernard High for throwing his principles chair into the school pool. Now he's being forced to go back to Emma's school, Santiago High. He asks her and her friends to sell their merchandise from their school business, which is off the charts cool. James promises her more business in exchange for selling a bunch at his party to all of his friends, including people from his old school. 
The Dream Team, which is made up of Caleb, Emma's best friend and James' younger brother, and Sophia, both Caleb's and Emma's best friend from the 3rd grade. They all initially agree to help James, and also want to make some good money from the party. But, there's one girl who wants to see it all burn up in flames. Sammi, a mean, catty, popular girl who has the hots for James, tries everything in her power to ruin Emma. After a bunch of run ins with the both of them, Sammi makes up a rumor about James, insinuating it was Emma who started it. James watches Emma embarrass herself on multiple different occasions, And still wont explain why he is upset with her. But, after Sammi gets a football player to put a cockroach in Emma's hair in class, Emma runs out to leave. She then runs into James, who Offers to give her a ride home. He then tells her he fiund out it was Sammi who started the rumor. And to make it up to her, he brings her to see her favorite series, 'Raven-Man' at the Drive-in theatre.
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
Hi there! I'm a young writer with a passion for poetry, and I'm excited to share my words with the world. Poetry is my way of capturing moments, emotions, and stories that I feel deeply. I hope my work resonates with you and sparks something inside.

When I'm not writing, you'll find me creating music and exploring the world of art. Music and art are two other ways I express myself, and they often inspire my poetry. I believe in the beauty of creativity in all forms and love connecting with others who share the same passion.

I'm always looking to grow as a writer, so I appreciate every reader and fellow creator who stops by. Let's inspire each other and create something beautiful together!

title: Poems From The Soul. POEMS FOR GOD
description:
Poems for the Soul, Poems for God is a collection born from the shadows of pain and the quiet light of hope. Each verse reflects a piece of a soul journeying through life's darkest valleys, searching for purpose, peace, and the gentle voice of God. In these words lie the ache of struggle, the vulnerability of surrender, and the resilient faith that finds rest in Him.

This book is for the weary heart, for those on the edge of giving up, and for anyone seeking refuge from life's storms. It is a reminder that even in the depths of sorrow, there is a divine hand reaching out, offering hope and restoration.

 In God, we are assured-our burdens lifted, our souls edified, and our paths lit with promise. Let these poems be a balm, a call to rest in the One who promises peace beyond understanding and strength for the journey ahead.

This cliche books is for you. Thanks for your support in advance

title: { Lost Luster } Poem Collection
description:
Lost Luster
======
Tick-tock,
Tock-tick.

How long has it been?
I'm trapped in a figurative lock,
not a shuffle,
not a ruffle,
no sound, not a lick
All except a clock's tick.

Tock-tick,
Tick-tock.

{ Continued in the chapter: Lost Luster }

======

'Lost Luster' is a collection of poems I've written throughout the years. I don't make poems on the regular, but I like writing them here and there. When I do write one, I'll leave it here I guess.

Some songs may also be paired with a song. If that's the case, it'll have [ ♪♪ ] in the chapter title.

title: Dark Devotion
description:
Dark Devotion is a gothic novella that pierces the heart and soul, immersing the reader in a world of aristocratic vampire passion. Elizabeth, a young aristocrat who has become a vampire, wanders in the darkness of her own desires. Her heart, once pure and innocent, now burns with a forbidden craving-love for her uncle, a powerful vampire who torments her soul and body. In this world where love and devotion intertwine with the curse of immortality, the heroine seeks a path to the light hidden in the darkest corners of her heart. Darkness, gothic elements, and mystical emotions form the foundation of this story, which, against all odds, leads to a bright ending.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
🇺🇸 Hello! I'm Raina Crow, a Ukrainian author exploring the realms of dark fantasy, mysticism, and romance. Currently residing in the USA, I write in Ukrainian, with translations in progress to English-bear with me on any linguistic quirks!
My stories often weave strong female characters into rich, atmospheric worlds filled with elements of fantasy, dystopia, and the post-apocalyptic. When I'm not writing, you'll find me lost in a good book, sketching, or indulging in my love for films, series, and anime.
Music fuels my creativity, whether it's Slavic and Scandinavian folk or rock bands like Evanescence and Linkin Park. I'm deeply drawn to autumn's magic and the promise of spring, the quiet beauty of forests, lakes, and misty mornings.
An advocate for equality, I write stories that celebrate diverse relationships and perspectives. My favorite colors? Black and the deep, cool shades that evoke mystery and depth.


🇺🇦 Привіт! Я Raina Crow, українська авторка, що досліджує темні світи фентезі, містики та романтики. Зараз проживаю в США, пишу українською мовою, а також працюю над перекладами англійською.
У моїх історіях ви зустрінете сильних жіночих персонажів, які живуть у багатих, атмосферних фентезійних світах. Коли я не пишу, я занурююсь у книги, малюю або насолоджуюся фільмами, серіалами та аніме.
Музика-моє натхнення, будь то слов'янський і скандинавський фолк чи рок, як-от Evanescence і Linkin Park. Мене зачаровують осінні чарівності та весняні пробудження, тихі краєвиди лісів, озер і туманних ранків.
Як демократка, феміністка та прихильниця різноманіття, я пишу про різні типи взаємин і поглядів.

Якщо хочете переглянути мої ранні роботи, завітайте на мій старий профіль @Daromira (я більше не маю до нього доступу).

title: Letters of Myls Valentine

Within this novel is my life written in letters, in poems that I have written through my toughest times, my darker times. 

Some holds stories of my past relationships, how I fucked up and caused the inevitable end of it. 

Some may hold happier memories, past or current events that made my happy.

Others are disturbing and dark, whist some are light hearted and heart warming. 

Here we go. These are the letters of Myls Valentine.

title: Radha's Krishna
description:
RadhaRamana, The Beloved of Radha he is. He is everything, in everyone. He is sung, he is loved, he lives. But Radha? 
______

Narrated in the voice of one of  Hindu mythology's most powerful characters, Radha's Krishna is a collection of poems, an offering to Krishna in the voice of his epic love.

The poems are narrated by Radha across numerous lifetimes, sometimes modern, sometimes the perceived. This is Her world after Vasudeva Krishna leaves Vrindavan forever.


Read on to transfer yourself into the magical world of the Radha and Krishna, their supreme devotion and love that continues to inspire millions.

authorBio:
Hi, my name is Hannah Rose, I go to some school somewhere, and spend an inordinate amount of time in the theater.  I spend my little bit of free time writing, reading, and watching videos of adorable cats and people falling over thing. I plan to go into film editing and will be studying film after high school. I've been through a lot of ups and downs over the past few years and it reflects in my writing, as you will see. There are stories I have posted that I'm not proud of, but I don't plan on deleting them. These stories, even though they no  longer represent me well, did represent me at one point and I think it's important to look back on them and see how far I've grown.

The things that keep me happy consist of swimming, photography, awesome music, the color green, and the Vlogbrothers.

authorBio:
"You, yourself are enough reason to write."

Grew up in the hills. Loves cats, sunny mornings, oranges in winter and literature. Hopeless romantic. Vibes with the Dark Academia aesthetic, is in Ravenclaw.

I write because writing feels like home.

I write because I thought I lost myself but in between commas and rhythmic parameters I learnt how to be whole again.

I write because I have something to say.

Thank-you, if you've made it till here. And thankyou if you're one of my precious readers.

title: Lost & Found | Stay With Me
description:
The BL series "Stay With Me" centered around themes of love and found family.

This is how I imagine the love confessions between Wu Bi and Su Yu would be, in the form of love poems. They each have their own perspective and voice based on how they show their love for each other.

You may notice some Easter eggs, such as song lyrics from the OST and quotes from the series. How many can you find? (｡•̀ᴗ-)✧

Part 1 | From Wu Bi to Su Yu
Part 2 | From Su Yu to Wu Bi

*Fun fact: I chose to keep it at 8 stanzas to represent the lucky number 8 in Chinese culture. The number 8 is considered the luckiest number because it's pronunciation "Ba" sounds similar to the word "Fa", which means to make fortune. The number 8 is associated with wealth, prosperity, and success.

From the 2023 Chinese BL series, "Stay With Me". 

**It is suggested to have completed watching the entire 24 episode series before reading to fully grasp each character's personalities, as they each show their love in different ways. Thank you!**
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi there! 👋 I'm DD! 🌸

💟 BL Enthusiast 🧋😜
💌Top BL ships: OffGun, BKPP, EarthMix, YinWar, BinJiong, GreatInn
💟 Writing is my outlet to momentarily escape from the world around me 🦋
✨I love writing BL inspired poetry

🎬 Not Me is my fave BL series
🎬 Currently obsessed with Stay With Me 💙🤍

🩵  Lost & Found | Wu Bi & Su Yu love poems

title: Life Poems: Inspiration of Life
description:
Life unfolds in mysterious ways, with every event carrying a purpose.
When lessons aren't learned the first time, life has a way of teaching them-sometimes the hard way.

These poems are born from my reflections on life's journey.
They delve into deep, emotional themes-thoughts and experiences that are often raw, yet meaningful. If you find beauty in such reflections, I invite you to explore my words.

Every time I come across a story, poem, or quote, I gather inspiration and channel it into my own expressions. It's a way for me to share what I've learned and felt, hoping it resonates with you.

I hope you find meaning in these words, just as I've found purpose in writing them.

Thank you, my friend, for joining me on this journey.

Cover Art: The image used for the cover is originally created by Alvaro Serrano. I've added the text and enhanced the design to blend the visual and literary elements together. I hope it resonates with you as much as the poems themselves.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey there, fellow readers!

I'm ES Edger Swift-like "Edge," not "Edgar." I'm a writer who barely writes, a poet who rarely sings, and a crazy coder who lives and breathes code every day. Writing is my hobby, and every comment from you feels like a trophy in itself. When I write, I hope someone out there can find a part of themselves in my words.

My journey began with a handful of local friends who became my first readers, and now I'm here to share my stories with you.

I believe in creating without causing harm-I'm probably the most peaceful person you'll ever meet. If you need to talk, feel free to drop me a message. Teaching is my passion, and I adore sharing experiences. I'm an ambivert, so I might be quiet at first but could talk for hours if we click.

Oh, and I'm a massive fan of manga, manhua, and manhwa. I dive into them daily-probably a little too much! I wish Wattpad had comics because I'd binge them here too.

I'm from Asia, a fellow human on this big beautiful world we share. There's so much more to say, but I'll leave it here for now.

Thanks for stopping by-let's create, share, and connect! 😊

title: One Last Wish | Harshita Agrrawal
description:
As the snowflakes fall gently on Christmas Eve, I'll be making one last wish to Santa, a wish that will echo in the hearts of all who've loved and lost. I'm sharing a special wish with you all, one that's deeply personal and universally relatable. Fans of a Lost Angel will understand the longing behind this wish. Read "One Last Wish" and join the chorus of hope this and every holiday season.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Welcome to my world of love, music, and imagination! When I'm not singing my heart out, I'm writing stories that capture the beauty of love and life. My quotes, 'Love! The most beautiful trail of two holy hands making you blessed' and 'Age never matters when love is all that truly matters,' inspire my writing and remind me that love is the greatest gift of all. On a personal note, I'm a hopeless romantic, forever devoted to the five loves of my life - my once, my always, and my forever. I must confess, my writing is deeply personal, and I often find myself pouring my heart and soul into stories that feature these five special individuals. They are my muses, my inspiration, and my everything. Join me on this journey of love, music, and self-discovery!

title: Whispers of My Heart
description:
**Whispers of My Heart** is a collection of poems that delves into the complexities of emotion, from the quiet strength of solitude to the tender ache of longing. Each verse reflects the evolving tapestry of my inner world-woven with light and shadow, resilience and vulnerability.

title: poems by me
description:
I write poems when I'm sad, so I've decided I want to share them. 

Current trigger warnings:
Mentions of self harm
Mentions of addiction
Brief mentions of sexual assault 

If you or a friend need help, please get it. 

Australia Queensland:
Mental health resources: 13 11 14

Australia wide services:
Beyond blue: 1300 22 4636

There are many other resources, but please don't be scared to reach out to someone before it's too late. You are important to someone. You are important. 

You don't have to be anything but yourself, even though it might feel like the world expects you to be something else. You deserve to be seen, exactly as you are. Please remember that your pain is valid, and reaching out for help is a sign of strength. You deserve support and care.

Addiction can be a very isolating experience, especially when people don't understand the depth of it. The struggle is real, and breaking free from that cycle is never as simple as others make it sound.

title: IT DIDN'T HELP
description:
"It Didn't Help" is a soul-stirring collection of poems that unravels the complexities of inner pain, self-doubt, and the raw truths of human emotions. Through lyrical verses, Ananta takes the reader on a journey into the heart of anguish, where love fades, scars linger, and hope feels like a distant dream. Each poem explores themes of heartache, desperation, and the haunting silence of battles fought alone. Despite the darkness, these poems don't shy away from the search for meaning in the mess-reflecting the quiet strength that comes from surviving your own storm. A collection that speaks to anyone who's ever felt unseen, unheard, or broken, "It Didn't Help" pulls you into a world where the beauty of pain and the fragility of healing coexist. These words are for the broken-hearted, the misunderstood, and the ones who still seek hope amidst the wreckage.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
✨ Welcome to my world of words! ✨

Hi, I'm Ananta, a dreamer, a learner, and someone who finds magic in stories. 📖✨

💫 I'm a student navigating the wonders of science, but my heart beats for creativity.
🌸 Writing is my escape, where emotions flow as poetry and imagination blooms into tales.
🖋️ You'll find pieces of my soul in every word I write-raw, heartfelt, and unapologetically me.
🕊️ When I'm not writing, I'm probably daydreaming, reading, or trying to figure out this beautiful mess called life.
Feel free to stay, read, and share your thoughts. I'd love to connect with fellow creators and readers!

title: Petals of Ink Instead of Tears
description:
For it is better to bleed on paper,
Than bleed on the ground.
For it is better to weep on paper,
Than weep on the ground.
For it is better to shout on paper,
Than shout on the ground.



Your weapon is a sword, 
Mine is a pen.
Your shield is of metal,
Mine is of a tree. 
Your battles are ancient,
Mine are older than humanity itself.
Your victory is blood on your hands,
Mine is ink on the paper.











Cover art is mine, done with Chinese ink and watercolor, on paper.
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
You can call me Em. I have a Bachelor of Arts degree in History and English Literature, and I just started my Master's degree in English.

I write in a lot of different genres, but I mostly enjoy writing fantasy and horror.

Things I love: warm socks and coffee. And hot chicks. And marshmallows. And bow-ties. And my big red dog. And tiny dragons that I can fit inside my pockets.

Sometimes I growl. I might be a werewolf.

I'm a big supporter of LGBT rights. Most of the stories I write have gay characters. I'm writing a girlxgirl with my friend  @cakewriter called A Tale of Two Lesbians. She's an amazing genius, so go check out her stories!

I'm also co-writing a sci-fi/horror story with my very talented friend  @phantomx called The New Generation. (Since I'm partly writing it, there's definitely going to be gay characters). It's on his account. Here's the link:
http://www.wattpad.com/18330251-the-new-generation#.UbEuQ0D2als


PEOPLE WHOM I LOVE:

@cakewriter    ~Exceptionally talented writer/genius/evil mastermind and caring friend~

@cherrybear    ~My amazingly talented and super gorgeous friend~

@DelicousInsanity ~My Beautiful Kitty~

@phantomx ~My protégée Marcy poo~ 


On updating! It happens when it happens. I'm sorry, but school comes first and I'm just starting my advanced degree, and I have 8 stories on the go, so I'm a very busy woman! But I WILL finish the stories, so do not fear!


@Shelob is my other account for poetry, horror stories, and short stories. And my crazy embarrassing love poems to my imaginary girlfriend.

If you're feeling down please read this: 
http://www.wattpad.com/11478467-crazy-em%27s-guide-to-dealing-with-depression

title: A Story Told in Verse
description:
(A collection of poems written by yours truly. Also, the current cover is made by the talented @MissRut)

They say each life is a story; it's true. Some of are filled with adventure, action, romance, tragedy, or even seems fictional.

They say everyone has a song; it's correct too. Everyone has a song in their hearts, with their own melody and unique beat.

And then, there are those who's lives are something in between. They're sung rather than simply said; they have meanings rather than just melody; they are not pretty songs nor fun little tales.

They are stories told in verse.
Tous Droits Réservés
